clean_body: Sexualization has NO place in elementary school. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, In case you missed Biden's latest absurdity... | Joe Biden is taking his support of Tik Tok activists' topless-dancing-in-front-of-the-White-House fiasco to the next extreme by using presidential authority to appoint an "anti-book ban coordinator" AKA, a 'porn enforcer' in YOUR kid's school. | | The federal government is out of control. You can rest assured that Gov. Ron DeSantis will use his presidential authority to put an end to EVERY ONE of Biden's senseless policies that are wasting YOUR hard-earned tax dollars. American children have been put through enough nonsense in the classroom through the mismanagement of Covid. It's time we focus on protecting them, NOT forcing sexualization into their classrooms. Yesterday, Gov. DeSantis posed a simple question to Joe Biden: "Why do you want to have that curriculum jammed into a second-grade classroom?" We can't wait to hear what woke nonsense will come in response. As a father of 3 young children, Gov. DeSantis is fed-up. Are you? | | We need your help getting Biden out of the Oval Office. Will you help out by donating to our cause? We can't win this fight alone. In Freedom, Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae995b2465e642da8d57129d2e0d52d8&_e=HZDTO_FILNIQ33nvBTRsVNmgJK8cBPMxiA27PoLzr7H1ps2eCf9xgqfGX_FGRAL8XkYscbWUCidywYfz1ar9nXLNHV9Yz0SWWS9YN6xetJvt2PIdT689lC7Qhp1V0Yc1UQamwzfqTjuGmiIGLRUqNZvHvoiqG_WAmbq1LfvcSO3oc6nZZRWSPKPJilVZuREzKOGXw2nqlQ9PVxOTIkCok36_C2-c06xIQBZNMg0ciiYIFgLV4_CZYZEKD5lZ87M-) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae995b2465e642da8d57129d2e0d52d8&_e=HZDTO_FILNIQ33nvBTRsVNmgJK8cBPMxiA27PoLzr7H1ps2eCf9xgqfGX_FGRAL8XkYscbWUCidywYfz1ar9nXLNHV9Yz0SWWS9YN6xetJsuJljfhfXAt6eFwPx-Wk6g2T14D1VcwHLdUV2YxMy0vd7mMGxlqKT9Z-2C0X3Yd89IqC1ZSE5H9rbedZ516c3SmMCqXtBVXxH97BNXK6eFdPewSdtfaZTQ4_8JzpLKETTrPVB7hsTxe9wpzGcVO4wn) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae995b2465e642da8d57129d2e0d52d8&_e=HZDTO_FILNIQ33nvBTRsVNmgJK8cBPMxiA27PoLzr7H1ps2eCf9xgqfGX_FGRAL8XkYscbWUCidywYfz1ar9nXLNHV9Yz0SWWS9YN6xetJsbbU55Bxt2vH4ARr0kkGp22nmbRWZaMVaimocVTytM8jYnabWkdXqwXMyiawZfP8_de4K9O93NGg1J3e04M8WE3F6ZSukSkqmxBN_FaGnweV3JIZOYaxvCbDMJjSHjLxD7vqZNTpaA6meMENj_4WIt)

As we stand on the precipice of a new chapter in our fight, I am reminded of the powerful words from our chairman Eric H. Holder, Jr on the recent U.S. Supreme Court decision for _Allen v. Milligan_ case:** **
_**“It is a testament to the tenacity of the voters of Alabama, who knew their rights were violated as a result of a map drawn in a discriminatory manner, and took this fight as far as they could to not only ensure their rights, but the rights of Americans across the country.”**_
The recent Supreme Court decision has reverberated through the halls of justice and reignited our resolve. In this historic moment, we have witnessed the Court's commitment to upholding the fundamental principles of the Voting Rights Act, a beacon of hope for communities of color seeking fair representation.
[**However, this victory is but one step on a long and relentless journey**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64963771/411855560/-1316552396?refcode=20230617_AOTL_F_OliviaAL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmMmQzNTdjLTA2MGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WmTTWFKrQNlqi3d0l1Bj8HORGZU-DmG6NAmjPaWvYZ8=)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e263dee3a1524f58ab13793e17df5674&_e=ctUebnsDGbUnQ3xTohSnPF407cXhda8yljl5uyVfdGnULSlsocsvMNxLlyTnBgI5sWLLy5JlvxVqoVJzYTyK_VVjpebaFBi0EM9qurwJwTfMoGlcpk1E9Ewl7LIc3blzBSfREfKewEdXJx6X1APvYGkMBJY-MAXg_3c7xCYz0rRrG9oa-hErlp5_QDm9xubQr4DBFqYLOJ2i1g8yk9IyiSPObVDKXhCgkhepQCT1PHzBNRT3oO2VDE_S7rYtNEiyVWwxWk0wexrlPFVFM9HGOBr8i6wePTgDS0CRh3mLEAwM4ktw_3tsSFaccrRJ2Albo21MetpeookB0uLsk5Cgzup3o5p0dadt-0NMT650WTDSMv9681LVhVD5f0E-W31ov2QSl8lsPE4qGqnnIa8QbSP5dbk8SQSrvwJx1sgN_gE%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e263dee3a1524f58ab13793e17df5674&_e=ctUebnsDGbUnQ3xTohSnPF407cXhda8yljl5uyVfdGnULSlsocsvMNxLlyTnBgI5sWLLy5JlvxVqoVJzYTyK_VVjpebaFBi0EM9qurwJwTfMoGlcpk1E9Ewl7LIc3blzBSfREfKewEdXJx6X1APvYGkMBJY-MAXg_3c7xCYz0rRrG9oa-hErlp5_QDm9xubQr4DBFqYLOJ2i1g8yk9IyiSPObVDKXhCgkhepQCT1PHzBNRT3oO2VDE_S7rYtNEiyVWwxWk0wexrlPFVFM9HGOJO6tmZdLUTtlfWgtiIqO1KWmKXR_Cz_Bs1pWKtie35P_LQ5eC_tpeECubB-jYQxPcQctavYiOZ1d0CMsSv1o-UP0g9GUwlB9ZacFdxCeOm4WaR4QcGQqmHRzsoop0puLuNDq7SZhQDDgWhwzJrCt2w%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e263dee3a1524f58ab13793e17df5674&_e=ctUebnsDGbUnQ3xTohSnPF407cXhda8yljl5uyVfdGnULSlsocsvMNxLlyTnBgI5sWLLy5JlvxVqoVJzYTyK_VVjpebaFBi0EM9qurwJwTfMoGlcpk1E9Ewl7LIc3blzBSfREfKewEdXJx6X1APvYGkMBJY-MAXg_3c7xCYz0rRrG9oa-hErlp5_QDm9xubQr4DBFqYLOJ2i1g8yk9IyiSPObVDKXhCgkhepQCT1PHzBNRT3oO2VDE_S7rYtNEiyVWwxWk0wexrlPFVFM9HGOHXZzZsJpyd6cfZjWeobrbtbiHiZf-yOR0tIQG7ZLD-9oEL41KrRzfSwPwSq4oy9-b81AxxDf6NqxlBBggbeJhQNvII2RUnpQm8mCQwmvIkZa5rV6CMUnc4tw8_KI_9vYgyGdR50uG7dttW0tpo3BQk%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: I will defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish.

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother
survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City.

He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked
for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats.

These claims were lies — all of them.

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos
told to get elected.

George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state,
and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including
money laundering and fraud.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1001&akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx ][IMG]

So, I've announced my intention to run for Congress to replace him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1002&akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx ]My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch
in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help me send George
Santos into political retirement?

CHIP IN →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1003&akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx ][IMG]

I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious
persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when
-- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place
where women had real rights and could determine their futures.

I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran
for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and
the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to
perform them.

Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican,
flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for
the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills
codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns.

Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people
of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing
about him.

Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and
pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our
values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18971?t=1004&akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx ]But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m
asking: Will you split $25 between Charles Booker and my campaign to help
me defeat George Santos?

My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters
here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s
time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values

Let’s win this thing,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230617-3317-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3317_346206_RZ-lnx&akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3317%2E346206%2ERZ-lnx

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[ ]My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help me send George Santos into political retirement? CHIP IN → [ ][IMG] I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [ ]But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Charles Booker and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos? My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How good public policy is lifting up our state – update from Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11570800?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The average person in Mississippi is 25 percent richer today than they were in 2017. **In just five years, the per capita income in our state went from $36,902 to $46,248.
---
|
---
| And before you ask, those dollar amounts are in constant 2022 dollars. In other words, even allowing for inflation, Mississippians are a quarter richer now than they were only five years ago.

**Does it surprise you that Mississippi is actually doing well?** For as long as anyone can remember, Mississippi has been brow beaten into believing that we are bottom of the class, with the lowest income and slowest growth.

**It is time we stopped thinking of our state as last.** As someone new to this state, I can see it’s an outdated image. As someone that has looked at the numbers, I know it just isn’t so.

**Between 1959 and 2022, Mississippi was the second fastest growing state in America, with average annual growth of 2.61 per year**. (See [https://united-states.reaproject.org](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=185ca7eaa3&e=5703353baa) for details)

Pretty impressive, no? It would have been a lot more impressive if it was not for the period between 1980 and 2010. **Having achieved some remarkably fast growth relative to other US states in the 1960s and 1970s, Mississippi slowed down dramatically in the 80s, 90s and the noughties.**

Mississippi had three decades of sluggish growth from about 1980 to 2010 because our state had bad public policies in place:

* **Too much government:** For much of the period 1980 to 2010, Mississippi was a one party Democrat fiefdom. The size of government ballooned.
* **Public payroll too big:** More and more people were hired to work at public expense, crowding out the private sector.
* **Taxes too high:** With too much government and too many people living at public expense, taxes rose relative to those in other states.
* **Dependence on Washington:** If handouts from the federal government made a state rich, Mississippi would be the richest state in America. They don’t.
* **Too much regulation:** One of the legacies of one party rule in our state is that you need permits and approval for far too many things.

**After decades of bad public policy, Mississippi is starting to grow rapidly again. **Why? Because bad public policy is being replaced by good public policy.

**In the past few years, for example, Mississippi has significantly cut the tax burden, notably slashing the state income tax to a flat 4 percent.** Since 2018, the size of the public payroll has been significantly reduced.

**In 2021, there was an important move made to deregulate the labor market, with a universal occupational licensing law.** This has put pressure on licensing boards to remove some of the most arduous red tape.

As a direct consequence of this not only is per capita income in our state rising, but we are growing faster relative to other states. **Having been one of the slower growing states since the 1980s, between 2020 and 2022, Mississippi was the 15 th fastest growing state in America. **

**Just imagine what our state might achieve if we were to build on these public policy improvements and completely eliminate the income tax?**

What if we repealed some of the so-called CON laws that inflate the cost of health care in our state, and made Mississippi a less costly place for employers to hire?

Far from being bottom of the class, Mississippi school standards have in fact improved. The use of phonics and testing have had a significant impact on children’s literacy. **What if we built on that achievement by giving mom and dad control over their child’s share of education tax dollars to spend at a school of their choice? **

Mississippi needs leaders prepared to build on the impressive reforms of the past few years, and which are already having a significant impact in improving our state.** We need leaders who believe that with good public policy, Mississippi can be the equal of any state. **It is good policy, not federal handouts that will decide if we prosper.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=caeb82544d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| Ps. My friend Jim Herring has written a rather good book. You can watch Jim and I discussing it [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=21bffeda4a&e=5703353baa).
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7540d48f20&e=5703353baa)
---
Douglas sits down with MCPP board member Jim Herring to discuss his recently published book, "The Switcher."
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2178ebef41) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2178ebef41).

Dear Friends,

Early Voting is open today until 5pm.

You can vote today, Saturday, June 17, at the local registrar's office. For Chesterfield residents, vote at 9848 Lori Rd. Chesterfield, VA 23832. For Colonial Heights residents, vote at 201 James Ave. Colonial Heights, VA 23834. You have until 5pm.

Or you can come out on Tuesday, June 20, and vote at your usual local voting location. Please note, Saturday, June 17, is the last day to vote early.

We have an important need for volunteers to work at the voting locations on Election Day, Tuesday, June 20, from 6am to 7pm. Thank you to everyone who has signed up so far. We still have some gaps in coverage. Please sign-up today, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com). You can work your home precinct, or one nearby. We're hoping volunteers can help for 3 hour shifts. We especially need people in the morning from 6am to 9am and in the evening from 4pm to 7pm. We have over 50 locations to cover and it is very important that we have comprehensive poll coverage, so please [sign-up today](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73f43e4df7d34e25ba7a198387075100&_e=QfdYSfYlqOCk8Yl_uV87AN0ZquG5POWhUo6TvG8C4nR3EOd39UJ5SeTKqoscwuRHKDfYHIriBTx4hvVJRIpNuNRU2uA9k6sd3Q1HyRCrl4LmvUvr5jCnTDJeZTxNLK1LrkQIgnII_so0_BvoFHHrrfOnppxcwLukOqSFXPenpHkDb0TpW7n-TLtrmRjg0bna87oHbuLJMHIG1IBkOI7q4VaRMOQaEkRvGwzsGGRG8o9xUUgbhLIy7tNBwoIoGGHPfVcnwxSAPgAVBc0GuomWfnWXRqpT-v_yeYsX-yNYPkkUkezfYATVx5sGr80tvf-WoqAyW1dT59SFsabpXG0WFwc1UZMORm6rSGIVKfktOLG6YCGMhUC0MGlmd7szju0aIq1hQPAWZoNs-xxQVIu0j_LXprHSqVGQK_1ZJtMzwHY%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73f43e4df7d34e25ba7a198387075100&_e=QfdYSfYlqOCk8Yl_uV87AN0ZquG5POWhUo6TvG8C4nR3EOd39UJ5SeTKqoscwuRHKDfYHIriBTx4hvVJRIpNuNRU2uA9k6sd3Q1HyRCrl4LmvUvr5jCnTDJeZTxNLK1LrkQIgnII_so0_BvoFHHrrfOnppxcwLukOqSFXPenpHkDb0TpW7n-TLtrmRjg0bna87oHbuLJMHIG1IBkOI7q4VaRMOQaEkRvGwzsGGRG8o9xUUgbhLIy7tNBwoIoGGHPfVcnwxSAPgAVBc0GuomWfnYBnT8BfaaE1DiwUCDVxwaap49hL5G90-iInDCGb-n60RynqUJ-X6i9JdhRSg2DuK41w9hlzXLFZ0_Y6JS8zsqlwCjo8AvjAan85OwBqGtppNEuNZzNif-ZlPLYRFJTOIuyIN2GiUGOHDAJJovGXkE%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73f43e4df7d34e25ba7a198387075100&_e=QfdYSfYlqOCk8Yl_uV87AN0ZquG5POWhUo6TvG8C4nR3EOd39UJ5SeTKqoscwuRHKDfYHIriBTx4hvVJRIpNuNRU2uA9k6sd3Q1HyRCrl4LmvUvr5jCnTDJeZTxNLK1LrkQIgnII_so0_BvoFHHrrfOnppxcwLukOqSFXPenpHkDb0TpW7n-TLtrmRjg0bna87oHbuLJMHIG1IBkOI7q4VaRMOQaEkRvGwzsGGRG8o9xUUgbhLIy7tNBwoIoGGHPfVcnwxSAPgAVBc0GuomWfrgbfOk9DlCe54OKOFBl1zRfIZH3wwayvH6vDTAkv2yyuX4LZOthhAY3zs7EetmBjiGHyZ6Yp0LXZMevxG6zQul1_zUn54SwRjkxdMVfDcAnUN0Vj3Ff-eDu37XIS8STGRTP9eJhvJMn7-jjKmia6Eo%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73f43e4df7d34e25ba7a198387075100&_e=QfdYSfYlqOCk8Yl_uV87AN0ZquG5POWhUo6TvG8C4nR3EOd39UJ5SeTKqoscwuRHKDfYHIriBTx4hvVJRIpNuNRU2uA9k6sd3Q1HyRCrl4LmvUvr5jCnTDJeZTxNLK1LrkQIgnII_so0_BvoFHHrrfOnppxcwLukOqSFXPenpHkDb0TpW7n-TLtrmRjg0bna87oHbuLJMHIG1IBkOI7q4VaRMOQaEkRvGwzsGGRG8o9xUUgbhLIy7tNBwoIoGGHPfVcnwxSAPgAVBc0GuomWfgTLFytkCMTxjU2JHx9qdBZ5Y3GPeZ6yzt5GeBbjH36kSEe--OIFuxQxPKPLwgXB9T0BvlK0VWReG4tqZoA8D1X4IoZZD_3z3ai16lsJp4oodArDT8li7qvIiAKoQOqTaO3l6JA1m-d_DJc_ddsY1dk%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Fellow Conservative, We’re reaching out today because we wanted to let you know that inventory is running low on Sen. Cruz’s newest book _Justice Corrupted_. **We've discussed the first five chapters here via email, but if you want to read more, we urge you to order your copy today.**
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._A)
---
[**ORDER** **NOW >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-A)
---
This book takes the reader inside the justice system, showing how the wrong hands on the levers of power can strangle liberty, crush opposition, and wreck lives. The notion of a "Democratic" or "Republican" Department of Justice is OUTRAGEOUS. The DOJ should operate as an independent and impartial institution that safeguards the constitutional rights of all Americans. In _Justice Corrupted_ , Sen. Cruz equips patriots and lovers of liberty to DEMAND accountability from the DOJ and every federal agency. Don't miss out – _**[order yours today](http://trk.tedcruz.)!**_ -Team Cruz

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Federal agencies are targeting us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=1129b213514c417ba37ed8e79e709805&_t=nfdOyxE0fvFTq1n1KSvOEibmBXP9x5m0BZpnFp_gMOSaAOcvEKPfkBbY9nJWCkE6BuwDlRPXEimML4frytfqnpp4ck6ZIaqo071gW5ItzSI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=1129b213514c417ba37ed8e79e709805&_t=nfdOyxE0fvFTq1n1KSvOEibmBXP9x5m0BZpnFp_gMOSaAOcvEKPfkBbY9nJWCkE6BuwDlRPXEimML4frytfqnpp4ck6ZIaqo071gW5ItzSI%3D)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1129b213514c417ba37ed8e79e709805&_e=KWAE_ZCevMCwl31pTtBsVlUTq0lJ4VOqP-8Swa30UahZeoC3k-NFB95SW6ZjVOnvGt8C8bM3P80VdvYw4GB8OFKM0jpzuvsBLM4rmeos93FJ_58VStKOJmhp3Sn7oTs5ypnt0xQLu6gf2S4RNqspgUU0HDh5QDCt8raU4uWewKLZEjCdYfb8m4jCNoXbQzNdib7upVlRX7T9wl9m9u7u9kFo7jy2fMBt-sWd8Zm3Vge0ybesh4fhfY3wM1Wbdq_avxVNoT584gCf6Kff1TsNUFUuuRV8UdxEwxf0I2s_8u9btgUzPVsfHKmkXNBt0sZQf16U0q1xCP4UkvwgnvjhFUTo7NmJu4e1e8zoG9em4mF3Tb46QhrKFvt5wGlx5y9d8oOgQiy3j0tjxSKgAvaoqR1WMcT-Fv4bkAD_4KbWe3azFm79g_3A6SV0C6dLNHrXR0SoFiUltoIsSrpB_oaU5w%3D%3D)
|

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7Dfe102AtS9IePd6w7vzPiXtNCWQROhLGXkzaAGUXFuCkFW-qKkcLxaydZpezxOoB-Fo7rt4yY3cdRsc1tQFrC_Ey7zt1nlzxpuY4mZ08HL895J8yhtoeHOKc-tsFA0KiuwVL7so92zy5U1gFmCgGciZ)
---
| | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy."
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7Df_V0KE8fWJePkcjRlUITFtSPjvTwkqF1DoZsFhSLO5-TW0fLCyUHdHIeKspWS1XaU64o0lC1__ZMhmq2MJI5KaT38sLejY_y21J8YdveCmsA2AwAWZWadABssvwUUKn-BcUR6CULRVEHdlZTYo7QHK)
---
**_Before transitioning_**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7DfTJVQOSxhTCBTi-aJMSjvZa7RWVTqWEVdau4ummdvCSebYbQAedKAoFxV4ZIJ02ax67KWdVjbSS_J30a6XXVAlk0dVrHOkYlNPNbgNOM0XddkEt1v-hvfZKb6ZBRT-4XDf1T_oKe7PWTDCkx3Wvzpr)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7Dc34br2-P9-1Vzk6kjvwxD3oN_3efGaNQQu5jiMQ2R6uF39fZ1oKDdcpVqPqamgYLOJaZts-gk9GqEo50YOa_ZQloz0g42j3IoKn92XKFaNYDqP23GVm9tKLobhY6Xq4tTmZhBIYPkp3ZBQGTJrEhNF) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7Dc1W89LNUDXS2TCRcJwdYIimjD_Eb2aO0R-BKDAUx6P9XauemLo6_gjuS-Me5r4PgjZbbIyWj6oMSZbyAMoMm2BnSiSwo0i2MVPSd0w7-MgyAD65eDCLWunYVayq0Uxg-walIawBykrW0055HnzMZRb) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dc009e8c41fe476ba4c6c110a3e659a6&_e=XmtvsvvgJgjXkeSQMqB0EjhAktSDXQ113zSdh5JPIZrJlKU-2xfF76XwkVWJB-5HoUQ_fRllxd1kvFonvuOyUJmr12VmMn1AEd2FIDckeutjdU89SLcjbO3PfNNqWYmI_9WEkmgdEXps0_hsYhWxjKeECZ28pgSOxhUfKf4xUOta1wXsoN1WmLwc5XTMYY6Vfe4CBSfN3Nmu0ddwbAUa_NlZFjZXAKKRXV6hB3VG7DcAetg4knaT9mrfemjm23lTqkLjbjN_lw5fVdT2ro0teG9TAUH3xPjemha0zKOs7QbNGeQnJVDnvsHMdIg1ysinsG4-PU1JgBbF3Jv9UaMqb65tVUTkiKSHKRYtRQjD0u5ruaR-Rg5N5P-dbUHQhX_d) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered.
---

clean_body: There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. | | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. | | | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy." | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. - There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. My experience of over 25 years in serving Louisiana has given me the knowledge and skills necessary to make a real difference for all of us here. **_But to really make an impact, I need your support._** I can’t stress enough how crucial your support is during this pivotal time. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6rjgQybFQoWBhboNgjQpiRE11o4hPkByHfjvAyHeNKnSzgzOwdz78-ZvQAel_RtEnGv0tfkEvvQPHu6VWidIPEGnnLwSSnNhuLReD9tsnLKTHHCWZrJCCefEcJ9xUpM1Sk7hZTIvSjqA1To5jUaGEe040HxyhJFWamnVdLHGBWGdc8qpdXUrG0XF8lgPCpAivOdK_fOSsA_HfO-9NKZfmVqYWkr_uOS6M7VsOUFHphaIWCkAp8bhnw_4-sm3ymtesXb-jm9vFVs7WXp59OhbftSATF9Lza1g6JR2psy5irjRIzJ9xQh0fA0DxAK0J6avX17_V-n_KJ-XOXVMnenr91f-48afEQx13sovOg5qxrJR7Cf9EnIc-n-U8TsAAP__Uf-U_A)
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6rjgQybFQoWBhboNgjQpiRE11o4hPkByHfjvAyHeNKnSzgzOwdz78-ZvQAel_RtEnGv0tfkEvvQPHu6VWidIPEGnnLwSSnNhuLReD9tsnLKTHHCWZrJCCefEcJ9xUpM1Sk7hZTIvSjqA1To5jUaGEe040HxyhJFWamnVdLHGBWGdc8qpdXUrG0XF8lgPCpAivOdK_fOSsA_HfO-9NKZfmVqYWkr_uOS6M7VsOUFHphaIWCkAp8bhnw_4-sm3ymtesXb-jm9vFVs7WXp59OhbftSATF9Lza1g6JR2psy5irjRIzJ9xQh0fA0DxAK0J6avX17_V-n_KJ-XOXVMnenr91f-48afEQx13sovOg5qxrJR7Cf9EnIc-n-U8TsAAP__Uf-U_A)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we’ll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6rjgQybFQoWBhboNgjQpiRE11o4hPkByHfjvAyHeNKnSzgzOwdz78-ZvQAel_RtEnGv0tfkEvvQPHu6VWidIPEGnnLwSSnNhuLReD9tsnLKTHHCWZrJCCefEcJ9xUpM1Sk7hZTIvSjqA1To5jUaGEe040HxyhJFWamnVdLHGBWGdc8qpdXUrG0XF8lgPCpAivOdK_fOSsA_HfO-9NKZfmVqYWkr_uOS6M7VsOUFHphaIWCkAp8bhnw_4-sm3ymtesXb-jm9vFVs7WXp59OhbftSATF9Lza1g6JR2psy5irjRIzJ9xQh0fA0DxAK0J6avX17_V-n_KJ-XOXVMnenr91f-48afEQx13sovOg5qxrJR7Cf9EnIc-n-U8TsAAP__Uf-U_A)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Republican Majority
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Patriot, This month, my team and I have decided to _**[hand-write the names of our first 100,000 donors across the walls of campaign headquarters.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838459:JBNPPbIVN:m:1:3299561967:D13A0BCDD258011A332BFF935451C930:r "hand-write the names of our first 100,000 donors across the walls of campaign
headquarters.")**_ That is how much your support means to me. The excitement from launch day and the kickoff of my campaign has proven to me that America is ready for an energetic executive, and my team is dedicated to proving that we're willing to go the distance. I was able to travel across our nation on our Great American Comeback tour because of the grassroots support I've received from American patriots who believe in a better tomorrow.

I want to see your name go up on the walls of our home base. We are embarking on a mission to restore freedom, sovereignty, and sanity to our country, and I want you fighting alongside me. I'd like to see your name go down in history with mine. Do you? **[rondesantis.com/donate/add-your-name](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838459:JBNPPbIVN:m:1:3299561967:D13A0BCDD258011A332BFF935451C930:r "rondesantis.com/donate/add-your-name")**

---
| | [GET YOUR NAME ON THE WALLS OF HQ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838459:JBNPPbIVN:m:1:3299561967:D13A0BCDD258011A332BFF935451C930:r)

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62838459:JBNPPbIVN:m:1:3299561967:D13A0BCDD258011A332BFF935451C930:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

---

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ruben Gallego

body:
In a million years, I never imagined this is how it would end up for me...
#

Peter -
In a million years, I never imagined this is how it would end up for me...
When I was a kid sleeping on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left, you could have given me a million guesses about my future and this would not have been one of them.
At the time, I could honestly say my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
I never dreamed I'd run for public office -- let alone win a seat in the House of Representatives. That was just unimaginable.
I would have never thought running for U.S. Senate was a possibility, let alone control of the Senate being decided by my race.
It would have been unfathomable to me that hundreds of thousands of people I’ve never met in my life would sign up to support me, let alone contribute their hard-earned money.
And I never thought I’d have to ask people like you to do more than that.
But with our FEC deadline coming up, that's what I have to do. One more time:
[**Can you PLEASE use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford to my campaign today? Do it before our FEC fundraising deadline ends in just two weeks. Time is running out and we're short of our goals. I need you today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230617-1-f&t=1&akid=716%2E734936%2EG3taN-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

The kid sleeping on the floor thanks you. The adult he's become does as well.
Ruben Gallego

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=716%2E734936%2EG3taN-). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=27&refcode2=716_734936_G3taN-&akid=716%2E734936%2EG3taN-)
clean_body: In a million years, I never imagined this is how it would end up for me... Peter - In a million years, I never imagined this is how it would end up for me... When I was a kid sleeping on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left, you could have given me a million guesses about my future and this would not have been one of them. At the time, I could honestly say my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that. I never dreamed I'd run for public office -- let alone win a seat in the House of Representatives. That was just unimaginable. I would have never thought running for U.S. Senate was a possibility, let alone control of the Senate being decided by my race. It would have been unfathomable to me that hundreds of thousands of people I’ve never met in my life would sign up to support me, let alone contribute their hard-earned money. And I never thought I’d have to ask people like you to do more than that. But with our FEC deadline coming up, that's what I have to do. One more time: - If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | - ** | - | | - | - | | - | - ** The kid sleeping on the floor thanks you. The adult he's become does as well. Ruben Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: John Kasich
subject: This was avoidable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
American society is facing some tough questions right now, and it seems like we're more divided than ever as we struggle to find the right answers.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=61b3fd800b0245d094dae5b4649a1292&_e=F7aZPd8VM1t5VEAN1HdHFHYqrHn3MJENDfjvWWJkasnNgejk-XtveuDaWsoP2bWI8cISZed67wIZAD_xPrWXVFMyCo3c7AawsD9EBsJyvXdX6Uog23-E2AcDevQBzL6Aj-vCHidBJPkJyFLYA_x2v5DED_X1mo1paCfLei1AgY2OTHuMgOpNtqSoPnPdJKC3n9MfNQ32OyXY6wek5U8CQw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, American society is facing some tough questions right now, and it seems like we're more divided than ever as we struggle to find the right answers.

With the latest news about the indictment of Donald Trump, one of the big questions we have to ask is if we want to live in a nation where the same laws apply to every citizen?

Some of the loudest voices in the GOP are suggesting that despite what appears to be very serious evidence that Trump committed crimes, he should be held to a different standard than you and I.

What kind of precedent does that set? What kind of message does that send to young Americans? What does it do to the bedrock principles of our country?

And it appears that this was completely avoidable. It's not that Trump had classified records that he shouldn't have. Mistakes happen. The real issue is that when the government did its duty and asked for them back, he is accused of stonewalling their efforts and obstructing the process. My staff shared with me [a short video from a speech that I gave in 2016](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=61b3fd800b0245d094dae5b4649a1292&_e=F7aZPd8VM1t5VEAN1HdHFFhRYxowaiqY9lAhU4G0EWm1ydeXPjNyHybKZXHc95k3kkh-R45wYvL0c8_rEMtiui5Qq3_kR90kxOR8dMvR6ec747lxd1GCayoptmzKy7CGxwWZKtRh_D3MLslcwC_omvRrrq0U-Dvu3EYiJb9kolfkyifsAv5O_eptR5xAjjpVU4qq_b0Vl1w1QuWfK6WNQ0VhMsu0gPJaqf7pkPAz1PA%3D) talking about the choice that we had before us as a nation. We had two paths to choose from then, and we ended up on the path to darkness and division. It's time to change directions. Don't you agree?
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=61b3fd800b0245d094dae5b4649a1292&_e=F7aZPd8VM1t5VEAN1HdHFFhRYxowaiqY9lAhU4G0EWm1ydeXPjNyHybKZXHc95k3ZT-Tdf7sZEpI65RB5BFpMFqnfmX-GPJeBpQ7omcUwB_xWSOK7lRTLbNEd1BYP_ZiK8pOs3whgVsIHz3A-Y5JG0s7pH2eiaAbrg4mnRYvQdHyItFaRzgUEymMOYNpPZbA9G-fi8cIRdO7iro9q6I4oeQI4923zG6ID7fPN4SGfd0%3D "John Kasich: Two Paths, America Has a Choice")
That's what I will continue to be focused on and you can count on me to continue rallying Americans to stand up for a compassionate and more hopeful country. **I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can.** [Peter - I'm counting on your continued support to ensure that we can keep this important work moving forward](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=61b3fd800b0245d094dae5b4649a1292&_e=F7aZPd8VM1t5VEAN1HdHFNO0l1JO83GCCZI8fPHJc2NrOux4hUHKR_hF0hG5jsOJSnYqKfopARJRIvkiFfJG2SdyugV9_KUuIzxuZXTz88QTLLyqkirG4FzVdqZkBBIP3ItHB6ccvqJziZAhNgIwK-SHsEH4UR3YNYvTGrY6UMOwKvv_pqVRQBTRymV3I2ttOfWjXcOoZzOdtOcwZ2aSeg%3D%3D). Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America?

clean_body: American society is facing some tough questions right now, and it seems like we're more divided than ever as we struggle to find the right answers.| | | Peter, American society is facing some tough questions right now, and it seems like we're more divided than ever as we struggle to find the right answers. With the latest news about the indictment of Donald Trump, one of the big questions we have to ask is if we want to live in a nation where the same laws apply to every citizen? Some of the loudest voices in the GOP are suggesting that despite what appears to be very serious evidence that Trump committed crimes, he should be held to a different standard than you and I. What kind of precedent does that set? What kind of message does that send to young Americans? What does it do to the bedrock principles of our country? And it appears that this was completely avoidable. It's not that Trump had classified records that he shouldn't have. Mistakes happen. The real issue is that when the government did its duty and asked for them back, he is accused of stonewalling their efforts and obstructing the process. My staff shared with me talking about the choice that we had before us as a nation. We had two paths to choose from then, and we ended up on the path to darkness and division. It's time to change directions. Don't you agree? "John Kasich: Two Paths, America Has a Choice" That's what I will continue to be focused on and you can count on me to continue rallying Americans to stand up for a compassionate and more hopeful country. I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can. . Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America? Together, we can bring about positive change and fight for America. I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for _just_ $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference.

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

[**So can I count on you to chip in $1, friend? clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us! Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . name: Team Trone
subject: Do you support Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
5,000 Signatures Needed: I Stand with the Democratic Senate Majority >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/8_-dHZbbr0SdnAhL3x8ATg2

Peter –

Ever since Democrats won the White House and took back the Senate majority, we've fought hard to rebuild our economy, protect our rights, and work towards an America that works for everyone.

But with the House in Republicans' hands and the Senate split 51-49, Mitch McConnell is already plotting to take back the gavel. That's why Republicans have their sights set on Maryland.

From standing in the way of the Inflation Reduction Act to dragging their feet on the debt ceiling, MAGA Republicans have and will continue to do everything they can to stall common-sense legislation and keep the country from moving forward.

Peter – that’s why electing David to the Senate is so imperative. Not only will it hold our Democratic majority, but David will continue to fight for progress on criminal justice reform and the opioid crisis – just as he’s done in the House.

Today, we’re asking you to sign this petition supporting a Democratic Senate Majority. We need 5,000 signatures, will you please be one of them?

ADD MY NAME >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/8_-dHZbbr0SdnAhL3x8ATg2

Thank you, we’re grateful for your time and support!

– Team Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/UMe6s_cVjEy2S-OBH1JVwA2?unsubscribedata=1hco8vkvgcssOVu306bGBA3lQiVzlMioFdaAa%2BL9xFV76GqWuFkFVlg9LckohLZCZYtWZrONF9XFRZSukaNXXeLwy7iqHr0%2FCHukltI6srJ6J9QfOI9SEXmbolJl%2BQJrvuEejKBrGRLZHG2TVI7jalgoXNqzAH39AHF9ZpWnMbBqRFcKCP50zLgk7p7EILygfIHEqB7Xvaq3K%2Fpe44uqsLbPcNZrOpqRXmnFCNjy46cJcxwB57NUdo658EGHYo5NPp1r4TQLQ4tuhOmCAdb9jMF%2Fc0JVQEAQ1sc5Di99uvcmNPtCGT3B6l7x3j2cW8vJRepmal8OCR5ivQy4CN2mRN6ARxdtfhjjUz%2FOzy2NfPI6TYVtHxgURgNPaGcj2u57JwjF3zx7WIIoJJcx82Bl3%2B4NzId5EULq%2BDMRZqqXqA6chM4CdVtzmEhDgZYYgcNa .

name: Rep. Young Kim
subject: Throwing in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669660%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g7Ov%2fbTPw9tVZW7VPLL78w&sysid=1)
---

This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X9scHNFaCoGzi6GGbz%2f%2bzw&sysid=1 "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don’t know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669662%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ry1v95c%2bomWtuVVdEvTwoQ&sysid=1 "Today, I’m personally
asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this
seat from the woke Democrats. ")**

No amount is too big or too small and it is all used toward ensuring we defend our razor-thin House Majority.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X9scHNFaCoGzi6GGbz%2f%2bzw&sysid=1 "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I would ask if it wasn’t critical, Friend. My seat could very well decide the House Majority and my radical opponent knows it.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X9scHNFaCoGzi6GGbz%2f%2bzw&sysid=1 "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
* * *
---
_We’ll get straight to the point, Friend:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she’s able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669663%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XGnybtag%2bf79KErTC3yFZQ&sysid=1 "So, we’re humbly asking

for you. ")**_
