subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW__PQzDN9

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history,
encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW__PQzDN9

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

World War
II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing
global fighting in unprecedented ways.

But
today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans
who fought in the war are still alive.

As we
lose more and more of these courageous Americans, we also lose
the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons
learned from this world war.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The
Second World Wars." And right now, you can receive your very own
DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on
behalf of liberty.

This
limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military
historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and
strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the
Allies' victory.

This is
one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there
are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to
secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one
shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World
Wars" on DVD today:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61929184:W__PQzDN9:m:3:2532013465:32A610FB9A8B4809F5D5845CA6132C8B:r

Thank you
for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans
through education with Hillsdale College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:

| |

---

This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zne1krs89p2heq6v985ek2bfe74rup3h7fq4s2jg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1h62o71chh2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don’t know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z92dd858phpmp1df8b9jn7358jnkg8n15gdivtso_rp22sh2s8i66o77c1h62o71chh2bs "Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.")**

No amount is too big or too small and it is all used toward ensuring we defend our razor-thin House Majority.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

body:
Can you help us reach our goals?
#

Hey there, we wanted to bump our message from the other day. We just had our mid-month fundraising deadline on Thursday, but we fell short of our goals. Now, we really need your help to catch up.
[**Please, can we count on you to chip in to GIFFORDS PAC and help us beat our fundraising slump? Your support is critical to our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=1&akid=5978%2E3935704%2E1me_Da)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=2&akid=5978%2E3935704%2E1me_Da)**
Thank you for your support. If you missed our message from the other day, you can read it below.
\- The GIFFORDS Team
\- - - - - - - - - -Original Message from June 14- - - - - - - - - - -

This isn’t the news we were hoping to share with you today, but we need to let you know that we’ve hit a summer slump. Let us explain:
In the summer months, donations can tend to drop off. But we weren’t expecting the drop off to happen so soon and so significantly.
We get it—right now is a busy time of year, and making a contribution to a PAC may not be the first thing on your mind. But in order for us to continue saving lives, we can’t fall short when it comes to our fundraising. Summer may be a time for relaxation, but the work to end gun violence never slows down. Your support is what makes our work to fight for stronger gun laws and elect gun safety champions possible.
Tomorrow is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re falling behind where we need to be to reach our goals. With our quarterly fundraising deadline coming up at the end of the month, we can’t afford to come up short.
[**So please: Will you pitch in $3 today to help us beat the summer slump and reach our June goals?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=3&akid=5978%2E3935704%2E1me_Da)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=3&t=22&akid=5978%2E3935704%2E1me_Da)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dkim3-&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=23&akid=5978%2E3935704%2E1me_Da)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQQH-N3NnI-twtXCy3WQjhwpEmpZDHsz5x-jAjOeH-fXCyF9KmnXnz4DHfn92zDzHk9atPOL0BOaoue-ch9ISxj2FGau993ckJLmTPTT9aJ7tlWs5gvOlwGs3JcqHkSXSvk9Jaea2X03iaNXqYhTgrfwZutRXA712YDg83ox3VaKUeQI9wx1mAQG-VPDPFfURqwxviBiWvhLUSbvscA_g8QEldnF5b2yqTFyZuTNzK_Y5UB5-QDgYKZaTaSsah0MrEjTCGNZS9_lv0A9-Pc3nbW3Lg0-bDmpm8_oUf7AdqDq6WnQCZvG5U6obQQl4fq4RL2BOTV0w-xMcQSm6YG5PXl0v_5elb_5HPhPnjclCWQ3h5-iwkV59eOB87mpbtZ4gxVGOZ4uth_J3e_uNLvwIAAP__9n6fAQ)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQQH-N3NnI-twtXCy3WQjhwpEmpZDHsz5x-jAjOeH-fXCyF9KmnXnz4DHfn92zDzHk9atPOL0BOaoue-ch9ISxj2FGau993ckJLmTPTT9aJ7tlWs5gvOlwGs3JcqHkSXSvk9Jaea2X03iaNXqYhTgrfwZutRXA712YDg83ox3VaKUeQI9wx1mAQG-VPDPFfURqwxviBiWvhLUSbvscA_g8QEldnF5b2yqTFyZuTNzK_Y5UB5-QDgYKZaTaSsah0MrEjTCGNZS9_lv0A9-Pc3nbW3Lg0-bDmpm8_oUf7AdqDq6WnQCZvG5U6obQQl4fq4RL2BOTV0w-xMcQSm6YG5PXl0v_5elb_5HPhPnjclCWQ3h5-iwkV59eOB87mpbtZ4gxVGOZ4uth_J3e_uNLvwIAAP__9n6fAQ) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQQH-N3NnI-twtXCy3WQjhwpEmpZDHsz5x-jAjOeH-fXCyF9KmnXnz4DHfn92zDzHk9atPOL0BOaoue-ch9ISxj2FGau993ckJLmTPTT9aJ7tlWs5gvOlwGs3JcqHkSXSvk9Jaea2X03iaNXqYhTgrfwZutRXA712YDg83ox3VaKUeQI9wx1mAQG-VPDPFfURqwxviBiWvhLUSbvscA_g8QEldnF5b2yqTFyZuTNzK_Y5UB5-QDgYKZaTaSsah0MrEjTCGNZS9_lv0A9-Pc3nbW3Lg0-bDmpm8_oUf7AdqDq6WnQCZvG5U6obQQl4fq4RL2BOTV0w-xMcQSm6YG5PXl0v_5elb_5HPhPnjclCWQ3h5-iwkV59eOB87mpbtZ4gxVGOZ4uth_J3e_uNLvwIAAP__9n6fAQ)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQQH-N3NnI-twtXCy3WQjhwpEmpZDHsz5x-jAjOeH-fXCyF9KmnXnz4DHfn92zDzHk9atPOL0BOaoue-ch9ISxj2FGau993ckJLmTPTT9aJ7tlWs5gvOlwGs3JcqHkSXSvk9Jaea2X03iaNXqYhTgrfwZutRXA712YDg83ox3VaKUeQI9wx1mAQG-VPDPFfURqwxviBiWvhLUSbvscA_g8QEldnF5b2yqTFyZuTNzK_Y5UB5-QDgYKZaTaSsah0MrEjTCGNZS9_lv0A9-Pc3nbW3Lg0-bDmpm8_oUf7AdqDq6WnQCZvG5U6obQQl4fq4RL2BOTV0w-xMcQSm6YG5PXl0v_5elb_5HPhPnjclCWQ3h5-iwkV59eOB87mpbtZ4gxVGOZ4uth_J3e_uNLvwIAAP__9n6fAQ)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried 188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m humbled to have the endorsement of the Missouri AFL-CIO.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you please give me a moment to explain why this election-winning coalition matters so much to our campaign?
#
Peter — earlier than ever before for a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri, working people are uniting behind our movement to replace Josh Hawley.
**In a moment, I’m going to tell you why the support of this election-winning coalition matters in this race.** But first, let me share a little more about my background and why I’m running for this seat:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
**[CHIP IN TO ELECT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)**
I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Jeff City, right in the middle of Missouri. Like most Missourians, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, medical bills bankrupted us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
But we weren’t alone. When my parents had to take my sister to get surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat.
The support from our community motivated me to work hard, stay focused on school, and run on the cross-country team. That all helped me get into college, which I could afford thanks to a Pell Grant and scholarships from people around town. I got to keep running there too.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
After college and law school, I joined the Marines to honor and serve the community that had done so much for me. I was active duty for 13 years. Deployed to Iraq once, Afghanistan twice. Then the Joint Staff at the Pentagon, where I'd go on to help lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
In the Marines, I learned what service for your country really means: Doing the right thing — even when you’re far away from home — and never forgetting the community you signed up to serve. **But for every tour of duty, I also learned just how little service meant to corrupt elites like Josh Hawley.**
I led a police training team in Iraq, running missions outside the wire through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. Near our camp, a burn pit bathed us in toxic fumes for months. And when we came back home, politicians like Hawley turned their backs on us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
Between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, I was stationed at Camp Pendleton. While our politicians let Wall Street banks gamble away our economy, I fought to protect service members from predatory scams and illegal foreclosures.
I deployed twice to Afghanistan. Learned Pashto. Investigated corruption. I saw how lies from corrupt leaders in Washington cost us two decades, $2 trillion, and nearly 2,500 American lives.
Then at the Pentagon, I saw how Big Oil bought off our politicians so dictators, war criminals, and a handful of corporate executives got to decide how much Americans pay for energy — while authoritarian oligarchs in China start to dominate renewable energy.
But between tours, one of the hardest things was coming back home and seeing what was going on in my old neighborhood. The community I had signed up to serve was stripped for parts. The corner store boarded up. Our first family home even bulldozed down. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
The whole time politicians like Hawley kept voting to send Marines like me overseas to fight pointless wars, they were letting their corporate mega-donors gut our communities back home. **And now they don’t just attack our way of life, but also the democracy I swore to defend.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed us he’s a fraud and a coward who will cut and run at the first sign of trouble.
I’m running for U.S. Senate because Missourians deserve a senator who’s willing to stand and fight for them. They deserve a warrior for working people — and I'm ready to serve.
**Now we’ve united on-the-ground leaders, workers, and everyday people across Missouri into a record-breaking movement to take on Josh Hawley.** This is the same coalition that defeated an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam statewide by 67.5%-32.5% in 2018.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
The national GOP and corporate elites are afraid of the movement we're building because this is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and they know we’re not going to waste it. **So I have to ask:**
**[Will you chip in $10 or anything you can afford right now to help us flip this U.S. Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, which means I’m relying on real people like you to power this campaign forward every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34262?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34261?refcode=em20230617-3274&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)
---
Together, we can take back our power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country again.
Thanks for always having my back, Peter.
Let’s get to work,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230617-3274-footer&t=18&refcode2=3274_614464_OmkVzM&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=3274%2E614464%2EOmkVzM). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: With extreme MAGA Republicans in control of the House, the stakes couldn’t be higher. | | | = = Our democracy is under attack, Peter. These right-wing extremists can never be trusted. Full stop. This is the radical ideology Republicans are trying to jam down the throats of the American people: – Banning history books – Suppressing the vote – Ending reproductive freedom – Cutting Social Security and Medicare – Defunding the FBI and Department of Justice – Enacting big tax cuts for the wealthy, the well-off and the well-connected All while promoting the conspiracy theory that the twice-impeached former president won the 2020 election. House Democrats will never bend the knee to extreme MAGA Republicans who have abandoned democracy, Peter. = = = = = Make no mistake, Peter: This election will be a historic opportunity for Democrats to take back the House – but we’re going to need all hands on deck to do it. Which means we only have two paths forward: – We can either sit back and let extreme MAGA Republicans cling to control of the House, lock Democrats out of power and force their far-right agenda across our nation... = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47827?t=6&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47827?t=7&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47827?t=8&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47828?t=9&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47829?t=10&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47830?t=11&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47831?t=12&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47827?t=13&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! [**DONATE HERE.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47827?t=14&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8547%2E878179%2EAN4Kyd).**

body:
She's running for TN House District 51

| |
---
Peter — Raised in East Tennessee, Aftyn has called Nashville home since 2017. Moving back to Tennessee after Trump was elected, Aftyn jumped right into state politics fighting for Medicaid Expansion and against harmful GOP policies. Since then, she has stood up to the Republican supermajority every legislative session, empowered Tennesseans in wrestling back local control from the state, and showed up for her community not only for the big fights but the little moments in between. **Aftyn was on the ground to support the Tennessee Three:** Justin Pearson, Gloria Johnson and Justin Jones. She's ready to continue to challenge far right extreme politics head-on in Nashville. **URD is proud to have endorsed Aftyn, especially because of her deep-rooted commitment to supporting rural voters.** Aftyn is the Campaign Director for RuralOrganizing.org, where she helps small towns and rural communities. She was even recognized by President Biden for her contributions to increasing broadband access in Tennessee and across the country. [**_Aftyn just announced that she is running to represent TN-51 in the state house. name: Berkeley Mashburn, Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
subject: One month since our launch
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
This team has already shown we have what it takes to win

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64980252/411899489/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230617OneMonth_DBW_7_Actives_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTcxNjc2NDEtMWQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-RbuT_Mp_W6r7oyRR-ehwck1azutk-iVPgFs_f_-hrY=)
Peter,

Today marks one month since we launched our campaign to elect Dr. Brian Williams to Congress in TX-32, and already, our supporters have made it clear that we have what it takes to win this election. But with so much at stake – gun safety, healthcare access, reproductive freedom, voting rights – we can’t afford to leave anything on the table at the end of the day.

It’s vital we elect Dr. Williams as the next representative from TX-32 because we need a voice at the table in Washington with frontline experience dealing with the realities of gun violence to stand up for policy change. Dr. Williams will be the first Black doctor and first trauma surgeon elected to Congress, and he’s running because he wants to put trauma surgeons like himself out of a job. His years of frontline experience and leadership make him the person we need in Washington.

[Our momentum is strong, Peter, but we have to keep it going. And our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up in less than two weeks. We need your support. Can you help us celebrate our campaign’s one-month marker and keep us going strong by contributing $10, $32, $50, or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64980253/411899490/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230617OneMonth_DBW_7_Actives_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTcxNjc2NDEtMWQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-RbuT_Mp_W6r7oyRR-ehwck1azutk-iVPgFs_f_-hrY=)

Thank you for supporting this campaign. We’re so grateful to have you on our team.

Berkeley Mashburn
Campaign Manager
Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: I got a favor to ask
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12b9d4f2-fc74-4717-859c-83fd534ca37a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just weeks away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65ab72ef-a30d-4e71-80c3-cf0cc1fd1c21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4286a24a-0ce1-4683-a6a0-141f684388b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7e8df44-9efb-403b-82a6-113411e809c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T814f3406-aad6-4edc-a94a-fe60951f1afd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T836b7bd1-80db-4eae-aeb9-dc44b01c361a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89e34828-90f1-463e-9510-79b986251832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

It's Will and Lila, and we're both celebrating our birthdays this week. Hey Peter, it's Will and Lila (Andy's kids) here! We're both celebrating our birthdays this week, and we want to share a bit of the love with our dad. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64980983/411903692/907170691?refcode=em23_230617_bdays_fndd_gq_act___wlb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230617_bdays_fndd_gq_act___wlb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b27daa9e-1f0d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjdkYWE5ZS0xZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2R0Nju2_P5C8KMYJ42OBX0rMYg1sNUeZrhhoBNMdTQ=)
---

**We might be biased, but our dad — _you know him as Andy_ — is the best governor in the country.** Not many people get to say that! He's hardworking, thoughtful, and kind. He's always trying to do what's right and help Kentuckians, no matter what. And he's the best dad in the world — no matter how busy his schedule, he always makes time for us.

So, to help celebrate our birthdays this year, we have a little favor to ask of you. We want to surprise him with something special to thank him for everything he does for our family and for Kentuckians — and to make sure he wins again this year!

**[We want to surprise him with 100 donations of any amount! We know it's a big ask, but it would mean the world to us and our dad. Can you donate today to help our dad win re-election and to help us celebrate our birthdays?!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64980985/411903694/907170691?refcode=em23_230617_bdays_fndd_gq_act___wlb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230617_bdays_fndd_gq_act___wlb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b27daa9e-1f0d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjdkYWE5ZS0xZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2R0Nju2_P5C8KMYJ42OBX0rMYg1sNUeZrhhoBNMdTQ=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s absolutely disheartening. Only 18% of Americans are satisfied with the state of the nation. | | | | Washington politics is steering this country in the wrong direction. I came up here to cut spending, cut taxes, and get us back on track to economic prosperity. But with Democrats in the majority, it has been hard. But I won’t stop fighting until the job is done - If you’re ready to END business as usual in Washington and get America back on track for success, join our team today! For too long, Washington politicians haven’t put YOU first. It’s no wonder everyday Americans have lost faith - between out-of-control spending and woke nonsense, many members of Congress have completely lost touch with the people who elected them. When I came to Washington, I took a vow to NEVER leave the people of Florida behind. It made me lots of enemies in DC, but it made our patriot force even stronger. Now, I’m calling on you today to fight the swamp head-on. | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. The truth is that for hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth like me who were shut out of the program after Judge Hanen’s ruling in 2021 — and millions more undocumented people who were never eligible — **DACA was never enough.** ❌
My future is on hold right now. Everything from finding a job to pursuing my education to accessing health care is prohibitive without the temporary protections DACA affords.
United We Dream Action is leading the charge to win a pathway to citizenship for immigrant youth and all undocumented people because millions like me are facing these same issues.
11 years ago, the advocacy efforts of immigrant youth and allies culminated in winning DACA. **Even despite its shortcomings, DACA is still a reminder of the power our community has to win real change.**
In our ongoing fight for permanent protections, we’ll need to come together and work even harder to win our demands — 📣 hosting Weeks of Action across the country, 🤝 meeting with members of Congress and the Biden administration, 🗣 and doing _whatever it takes_ to secure a pathway to citizenship.
We can’t do this without the support of grassroots allies like you, Peter, which is why I’m asking:
**Will you donate now to United We Dream Action to help us secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people before it’s too late?**

clean_body: 11 years of temporary when we need permanent solutions. | | | Peter: This week marked 11 years of DACA. 11 years of temporary when we need permanent solutions. 11 years of living renewal to renewal. 11 years of waiting. 🙃 We’re done waiting. Will you donate now to help United We Dream Action fight for more than just band-aid solutions and secure permanent protections for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The truth is that for hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth like me who were shut out of the program after Judge Hanen’s ruling in 2021 — and millions more undocumented people who were never eligible — DACA was never enough. ❌ My future is on hold right now. Everything from finding a job to pursuing my education to accessing health care is prohibitive without the temporary protections DACA affords. United We Dream Action is leading the charge to win a pathway to citizenship for immigrant youth and all undocumented people because millions like me are facing these same issues. 11 years ago, the advocacy efforts of immigrant youth and allies culminated in winning DACA. Even despite its shortcomings, DACA is still a reminder of the power our community has to win real change. In our ongoing fight for permanent protections, we’ll need to come together and work even harder to win our demands — 📣 hosting Weeks of Action across the country, 🤝 meeting with members of Congress and the Biden administration, 🗣 and doing whatever it takes to secure a pathway to citizenship. We can’t do this without the support of grassroots allies like you, Peter, which is why I’m asking: Will you donate now to United We Dream Action to help us secure a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people before it’s too late? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your allyship — we are stronger together. ✊ Aurora, United We Dream Action | 11 years of waiting for permanent protections is 11 years too long. Maximize your impact on our work to secure a pathway to citizenship by setting up a recurring donation today: | |

Hey team, You may have seen that earlier this week, we launched Fight Like Hell PAC. Today, I want to tell you a little more about the movement we’re building — and why your early support is so critical. **Here’s the deal: This movement is not about me — it will always be about _you._** It’s about standing up for your families and defending your freedoms. And it’s about building on the progress we’ve made together — making sure you have the leadership you deserve in Washington. That’s what my work has always been about. It’s why I’m fighting like hell to support working people, protect our most fundamental rights, and combat MAGA extremism. **[You’ve been by my side since Day 1. Now, I’m asking if you’ll stand by me once again by becoming an official Founding Donor to Fight Like Hell PAC. Let’s rally together to elect candidates up and down the ballot who will stand tall for our values and our rights. It’s about standing up for your families and defending your freedoms. And it’s about building on the progress we’ve made together — making sure you have the leadership you deserve in Washington. That’s what my work has always been about. name: James Carville
subject: Democrats need to get fired the hell up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14243?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11105%2E9716520%2Ex05KW0)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14243?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11105%2E9716520%2Ex05KW0)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterview2023/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14243?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11105%2E9716520%2Ex05KW0)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14243?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11105%2E9716520%2Ex05KW0)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14243?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230617-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11105%2E9716520%2Ex05KW0)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Addressing the root cause of student loan debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In the wealthiest country in the world, a higher education should be a right for all, not a privilege for the few.
#
Peter,
Just this week, Pramila joined forces with Sen. Bernie Sanders introduced bicameral legislation to **eliminate tuition and fees for most families at four-year colleges while making community college free.**
The College for All Act would finally address the root cause of the student debt crisis during a time when more than 45 million borrowers hold $1.75 trillion in total federal student loan debt.
[**If you're ready to stand with Pramila and take concrete steps towards ensuring working families never have to endure crushing loans from the very beginning, please make a contribution to power our movement and support our collective work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42461?source=em20230617-2612&t=1&akid=2612%2E420207%2EZGb6OT)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42461?refcode=em20230617-2612&t=20&akid=2612%2E420207%2EZGb6OT)**
**In the wealthiest country in the world, a higher education should be a right for all, not a privilege for the few.**
In the last 30 years, the cost of tuition at public 4-year institutions has increased 258%. The College for All Act will ensure that our country never returns to a debt crisis like the one happening today.
Peter, we're proud to know that Pramila is taking charge to fight for our values, vision, and our calls for change. But if we want this to make the impact we need it to in Congress, we're going to need to build up a groundswell of support from the grassroots.
[**Please chip in $3 today to power our collective work to transform our country's higher education system and ensure that everyone can afford to pursue a college dream.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42461?source=em20230617-2612&t=21&akid=2612%2E420207%2EZGb6OT)
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230617-2612-footer&t=22&refcode2=2612_420207_ZGb6OT&akid=2612%2E420207%2EZGb6OT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: VoteVets
subject: Weird times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
We’re in weird times, Derek —
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june23.FJK9fc&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=1&akid=10045%2E3013755%2EzjzReu)
Tommy Tuberville continues to hold up promotions for hundreds of senior flag officers. It’s gotten so bad that there’s talk about cutting the Space Command HQ’s planned move to Alabama. For context, Space Command is currently based in Colorado Springs.
And now, the Colorado Republican Party announced that they’re willing to give up Space Command — and potentially billions of dollars of investment over decades — all over letting members of the Military make their own health care decisions.
We don’t know if we’ve ever seen something like this. The Republican Party is unrecognizable from the party many of us grew up with.
But one thing’s for sure: VoteVets is going to keep pushing to hold Tuberville and the entire Republican Party accountable for endangering our National Security and putting the careers of honorable Military officers on hold.
We hope we can count on you in this fight.
Thank you for reading,
The team at VoteVets

Wait! Before you go: [**If you support VoteVets and our work, please: Consider chipping in $3.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june23.FJK9fc&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=2&akid=10045%2E3013755%2EzjzReu)** We’re the largest group of progressive Veterans in the country, and we’re going to drive millions of dollars into holding the Senate, expanding control in the House, and making sure President Biden gets re-elected.
If that sounds good, please:
| [DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june23.FJK9fc&refcode=em230617-1-15&t=3&akid=10045%2E3013755%2EzjzReu)
---

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND

clean_body: There’s still time to become a 2023 Founding Donor, and I would love to see your name in our records. | = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out to everyone to make sure they have a chance to become a 2023 Founding Donor! There’s still time to become a 2023 Founding Donor, and I would love to have you on our side. = | = | = By becoming a 2023 Founding Donor, you’ll have an immediate impact as we prepare for upcoming down-ballot races across the country and lay the groundwork for the 2024 cycle (not to mention our work beyond). With your support, we can be a catalyst for change and demand climate action. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
It's the first day of early voting! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=3fb386c766&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter,

It's the first day of early voting! We don't want to take up too much of your time this weekend, but we had to check in to make sure you've made your plan for when and where you're going to vote.

You can vote early today through Sunday, June 25th, or vote on Election Day, June 27th. Your early voting poll site will be different from your Election Day one -- [**find your site and early vote hours here!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=998eff0767&e=2de202398d)

Carlina has spent every day tirelessly fighting for us in City Hall. Now, it's time for our community to come out in full force to re-elect her. No matter how you vote, Carlina is counting on your support in this final stretch -- [**are you with us?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=221d6be065&e=2de202398d)

See you at the polls!
Team Carlina

name: Daniel Pardee
subject: We have to seize this moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi there, it’s Daniel Pardee, Finance Director for Gottheimer for Congress.

As Josh’s Finance Director, it’s my job to ensure we organize our funds, especially at this point in the cycle. We’re halfway through June, inching closer and closer to 2024 every day. The quarter is over at the conclusion of this month, and we need to prove our strength to the NRCC.

The NRCC is holding onto a 5-seat majority in the House. That’s right, just 5 seats. That means they are going to fight harder than ever to try and expand the majority, and after looking at the first quarter’s filings — they have the money to do it.

They may have their fear-mongering and dark money but we have something much more valuable: a dedicated network of grassroots supporters committed to furthering Josh’s message of bipartisan problem-solving. subject: To honor Juneteenth and the ongoing struggle for Black liberation,let’s push for reparations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
For Black liberation, the U.S. government must repair and take responsibility for ongoing anti-Black harms. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv6OBHdPDBNQ5MasKWz5D931soJlbXu-VV72TRthuCQzWbAkbeN1T_J3m6c8cwKB0jpohLsY3cdt-J6VPwu9BSZSoHtmnXgLY4eEjHK1k5eWU26cgxrKhhTXipLw0izcD1P704lJEirPfCtf9axbv92h3DYBkOMvopy_QdlWCdwAkzErnKkXPdz6bP6Xu7YBzHpKJsIYeCdC4Eu7vLzHvhDifl_wdZuejdQAKpibkSM_hkA8V9-Luklmk7PGRqTzlR1uK7f5Av0GXdJfAaWyLnlO2KFt5WIl25kvXC7lSZNWRnDhMs3E5B_K_KMWlcSZjt/3x4/lm8_V5p0T2KuUHvauSdQXg/h0/56RXlL4e1X_pe8TXuGAjIZh3J4M1-a12-ebkzjVTqFQ)

Friend, This weekend, I’m celebrating Juneteenth in my home city of Detroit, one of the most beautiful, Blackest cities in the country—where movements for civil rights and social justice are birthed. Our former Congressman John Conyers broke ground back in 1989 when introducing legislation to establish a federal commission on reparations, and this year I’ve been honored to support new reparations legislation from my sister in service Rep. Cori Bush. Cori Bush introduced the Reparations Now Resolution, which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans—as well as for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people. [**Please sign on today if you agree that we need reparations now. To honor Juneteenth and the ongoing struggle for Black liberation, add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of Rep. Cori Bush’s Reparations Now Resolution.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARESxW-SfCWQTxs6vavuNyX40IQvOu6hnp9OJZhUKTzObSwH_j-7ec6iljuLwvLIcFve_FThXpjInGmUKo5mPxQAvlukG5cYYnDBmJzJr5VIiSSI86MdHBg-pX7Fqxtdd9N3yQTn2h5_D4k58seAsjsnLPYU-HwtU6nKsXvIicDhte7MULrEBLXv_ExvxSvlXnxkPbb7u4XObS5IuB3nduNy-xMrL-MlmYDRrszr2rHC4Xfk1IU56LFOKsCrkDTtFcomZ_3bK1U7rjw-10ZxVeAEjVCJkVVTygYACxuBYdFmkIX2GvClfMrz9gLML0eFoS8NH3da5NVpdmBvD64xQdfcaxwQoUZNf8EwZ7LNom7G7huRqUIr1K1tWI4rm_qRJkKPIYJTDBgjkffrjE6onFmrmzUEO3PkdVatGakD-OcHEBzm5-yC9C7u6SyyvOacngPrA_z8inGlidDw3Mg_tEwpvvGSfkRc8xI8-4ipa1Q2IXsHsQFYDtMMd5alrdFK5nxgIJfGohdXNNHF28DXaxyvyXMoNeQVYNmNdw1iWhOKw/3x4/lm8_V5p0T2KuUHvauSdQXg/h1/LXQ4dZPJFY041BuDp6Y_VCeomrcbuVBVeXwMPcX5DzY) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARESxW-SfCWQTxs6vavuNyX40IQvOu6hnp9OJZhUKTzObSwH_j-7ec6iljuLwvLIcFve_FThXpjInGmUKo5mPxQAvlukG5cYYnDBmJzJr5VIiSSI86MdHBg-pX7Fqxtdd9N3yQTn2h5_D4k58seAsjsnLPYU-HwtU6nKsXvIicDhte7MULrEBLXv_ExvxSvlXnxkPbb7u4XObS5IuB3nduNy-xMrL-MlmYDRrszr2rHC4Xfk1IU56LFOKsCrkDTtFclbXn8fB4vE8oVcRiu8k-ZSDEePX3DMnxiL8kFSVdMZ_XohO7b4e5lC4dZLMRWwk-Uxsyk-C_dGLa4lcthTIb9DiSeA1UXTPgS4T3JuHQKudY6LkYbyl-jVWt1SOocHucwVGS_mct9eXXSaqSe0DxGUg8nVCS0k9WicH3UCMQIYZgJvTV6X7ClhqXq_LXT7N58E2Ta2EjkHlR3DOOvVz1rgiksnbcjeDTpJZESGKKx8F1ilaycOHNdq2J24ccRUDwgsjbQ-k7-P73TDFim4X-EqC9xjrD2sUIIkmnkAGn-ek/3x4/lm8_V5p0T2KuUHvauSdQXg/h2/ni0yqCE35foM-BgzTCPb4fVd31wlaYIW_olEYXf6yPc)

Our country’s wealth was built on the backs of enslaved Black people, and our government must repair and take responsibility for ongoing anti-Black harms.
**Throughout her life as a Black woman, Cori Bush has personally experienced how Black people continue to bear the harms of slavery and its vestiges.**
We see this in present-day health disparities, the growing Black-white wealth gap, escalating police violence against Black communities, and so much more. Anti-Black racism is built into our country’s institutions, including our criminal legal system, housing, education, and healthcare.
**To start to heal generations of trauma and get closer to equity, we need reparations for Black people in America.**
[**Add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of Rep. Fellow Conservative, In April, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging **Joe Manchin** for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=049d63cdf4d340cf9ee3d29b5b713a1f&_e=yhjQ5FC4DTpdjZ04ZFx4bR1rm9HJNoSMGQXS2SgdUnvM4xnZrqldqKM7COZzoJiSJ4U4FSYB7nuW_uXnXkijShZRpT09c_toojF1UUWtkfQUIB-mG0hT_lvp29xfnYe41-MiJWcpcFwxZIHnWkimSJ9tfW5dZR2Gy2cSoF0dRvsq-aOhmTNYR3CGEbDo6rqw6d1xvWBVtcwiWsQAMbTea8xVc5olQTGe9KwLfy2fVu0tOvBIRAQRSLoCzNuhkduhFnVNMoFmi_MZT73bATFu9u-3NBtxDzYhxkpnVLc2UcAPA5dGhWfph5u6ElbYOpwy2OpPrp284zrNRypuKyuMI4SbbfgfJDCvHYi3_2k6ZGnFqKvUN0fu0Y38RcNGZJHPYa4MzObQsaiMcZ00-6bTHN3S883hYChFjFu2Ugiq0oKZHHvzTGKB48V89VxrZL2qw7r89Wj2Z-_0iIAvASBv4vRf_35PJ4-rwUKt0656sM1Zh9ySRyAFRLawvWYD9CLn4TkLedZy6yS2wHqTFWAQw6loVPCfmOTHKEgZ37nQ7Q74mDp0fJ_ZFF3JVqNyt7SO2dYrDAfhlijCgH7OmQwOUqBUbEbW-TBJV_-NSKdoFkc%3D)**

**We need 56 more responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=049d63cdf4d340cf9ee3d29b5b713a1f&_e=yhjQ5FC4DTpdjZ04ZFx4bR1rm9HJNoSMGQXS2SgdUnvM4xnZrqldqKM7COZzoJiSJ4U4FSYB7nuW_uXnXkijShZRpT09c_toojF1UUWtkfQUIB-mG0hT_lvp29xfnYe41-MiJWcpcFwxZIHnWkimSJ9tfW5dZR2Gy2cSoF0dRvsq-aOhmTNYR3CGEbDo6rqw6d1xvWBVtcwiWsQAMbTea8xVc5olQTGe9KwLfy2fVu0tOvBIRAQRSLoCzNuhkduhFnVNMoFmi_MZT73bATFu9u-3NBtxDzYhxkpnVLc2UcAPA5dGhWfph5u6ElbYOpwy2OpPrp284zrNRypuKyuMI4SbbfgfJDCvHYi3_2k6ZGnFqKvUN0fu0Y38RcNGZJHPYa4MzObQsaiMcZ00-6bTHN3S883hYChFjFu2Ugiq0oKZHHvzTGKB48V89VxrZL2qw7r89Wj2Z-_0iIAvASBv4ozsND4yrUmO8EZRymDMC02lcMOjEJ8fPDrpx2uuv86vhcGStP0BrY5p6QhU0vSTUiZLDaSTe363j1abuKPaGfXnTd8vF_Kw9Di5m1_V0rUC1yd1-2FfPlXIIT6q9GXtMHeDROQBCEnG6DIwAxsR2Y4%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. That’s why I’m challenging him for his Senate seat. | | Fellow Conservative, In April, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies. Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959; Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia. As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election, We need 56 more responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you. Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an $80,000 Maserati SUV around D.C., but he also lives on a $700,000 houseboat in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants. American people are paying the price. Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Action Alert: Votes in the Senate on Bills Reducing Exposure to Toxics Coming Up Soon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64984056/411915568/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOWQzMzAzLTI4MGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpyQiRpUFe4z9WUKLNi5OFGKjW3iBmws5WB2RQtY7sU=&emci=6de87c6b-9d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0a9d3303-280d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, We are about a week away from the end of session, and **votes in the Senate on two critical public health bills in our priority Toxic Free Bills Package** –the Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546) and Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)–**are scheduled for Tuesday**. There are just a few days left for us to act. **[Will you write to your state senator today urging them to vote YES on these bills?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64984057/411915569/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOWQzMzAzLTI4MGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpyQiRpUFe4z9WUKLNi5OFGKjW3iBmws5WB2RQtY7sU=&emci=6de87c6b-9d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0a9d3303-280d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**
* The lotions, make-up, and other cosmetic products we use every day contain many chemicals known to be hazardous to our health, such as formaldehyde (a well-known carcinogen), lead, and arsenic. **The Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546)** requires cosmetic manufacturers to disclose all chemical ingredients in their products on their company websites as an accessible way for consumers to make educated purchasing decisions. It would also regulate or prohibit the sale of the worst classes of chemicals in cosmetics and personal care products.
* **The Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)** passed the House with bipartisan support earlier this month. It’s now waiting for a vote in the Senate to modernize Oregon’s Toxic Free Kids program to be in line with what science today tells us we need. A modernized Toxic Free Kids program would allow our health authorities to regulate classes of harmful chemicals. Children are far more vulnerable to toxic chemicals than adults, which is why it’s so scary that thousands of chemicals lurk in products our kids use every day.

**[Please email your state senator right away in support of the Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546) and Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64984058/411915570/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhOWQzMzAzLTI4MGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WpyQiRpUFe4z9WUKLNi5OFGKjW3iBmws5WB2RQtY7sU=&emci=6de87c6b-9d0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0a9d3303-280d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** We need to do everything we can to make sure that our lawmakers put the health of our communities first. I hope you’ll join us and help protect all Oregonians from toxic chemicals. Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

clean_body: Jasmine is leading the charge to make it easier for Americans to make their voices heard in our democracy Peter: Newly-elected Future Forum Democrat Jasmine Crockett is bringing the HEAT in Congress: = Since helping elect her this past fall, Jasmine has been using her position on the House Oversight Committee to push back against fast claims of “voter fraud” spread by MAGA Republicans in Congress. Before being elected, Jasmine was among the group of Texas House Democrats who broke quorum and fled to Washington, D.C., last year in an attempt at stopping a voting restriction bill from passing in the Texas state Legislature. Jasmine is leading the charge to make it easier for Americans to make their voices heard in our democracy – not harder. While the GOP continues to push demonstrably false conspiracy theories around nonexistent “voter fraud,” Future Forum Democrats will continue to hold them accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = After Fox News was forced to pay hundreds of millions of dollars in a settlement for making false statements about voter fraud to Dominion Voting Systems – and after Trump was impeached by the House for attempting to overturn the 2020 election – you would think they would end their crusade against voting rights. body:
"If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison..."

| |

---
| | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump 's new federal indictment:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5b44ff5d07f54e86ac0047f87b3f41ae&_e=MlnswGvgHsUOuXY8oMj_QuZ3GeENA8FeHg-eJGgxWzwBIqavDOpxoYPlWaYuPszKttxnEuDlOqUTyyBaVLzse8UNqh_kUyW3mviufdHg81HL0cSwYo1R1qPS9eMrj98w3vCFkgXgY_o6rlAWSmKMVLGfO71cPbnLZD90GmtRvBeACuULXt7hRxSkrx0xc-UNkyexmtRi-iX8gxUydfhHkD1tHIpz2l8OfCIZ1q_CZa5d5CeiMoIK2cf7TstLh1BG4iE9pZ2I7jOVeYAOUYfkF0B9skDIXzdRcuXqQcuu2meUvHY92MncBAr1GjTcHG8SwHF3Nj2zBdWLtd_djCrLB-CmPlnDaJhGYeQcG1ZgrqOam1cDCtdhR1lgjLGkuUC7pZ_yk-x9CmlWqvgaR6Q6Q4QMLrLRLz-4DdJApgKjaZCboCZnJgL8XHURIETyaU1iiJMWY5e34Uxfl94-YHaEYw%3D%3D "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment:")**_

**" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want."**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5b44ff5d07f54e86ac0047f87b3f41ae&_e=MlnswGvgHsUOuXY8oMj_QuZ3GeENA8FeHg-eJGgxWzwBIqavDOpxoYPlWaYuPszKttxnEuDlOqUTyyBaVLzse8UNqh_kUyW3mviufdHg81HL0cSwYo1R1qPS9eMrj98w3vCFkgXgY_o6rlAWSmKMVLGfO71cPbnLZD90GmtRvBeACuULXt7hRxSkrx0xc-UNkyexmtRi-iX8gxUydfhHkD1tHIpz2l8OfCIZ1q_CZa5d5CeiMoIK2cf7TstLh1BG4iE9pZ2I7jOVeYAOUYfkF0B9skDIXzdRcuXqQcuu2mdZk9zmeT5spdbNdKYNl98KjVnv2XHa2a3E8v7gSoX8FPmEaLv4czYZN6scvWZ_ea5PqN9aNuz4hGq3jCETwOPWZRC3OVqftWnvsx-2G-YxFt8dZPH7gZ6VeovhDR8nnUqpS8478MM0qVpbrcKcPz9icuH6D1loOOtWC8MWbinLhQ%3D%3D "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5b44ff5d07f54e86ac0047f87b3f41ae&_e=MlnswGvgHsUOuXY8oMj_QuZ3GeENA8FeHg-eJGgxWzwBIqavDOpxoYPlWaYuPszKttxnEuDlOqUTyyBaVLzse9TknMuhKLMkAYx_sZwt9Z1CWtOQMgqteJjX3M--nPGkPWT9SxjGKqv4wZCepd6gcuy7yD9Bo_i8WOZ7QZoSX6SPwRoxTvezH07PwkcojVCPqSgAI_PEiOnJzQMG_ZdPIPdoxlYZ2xj-T-7XJA0gHBWA4k0dI4aiQ0e-lNWzOeGpoBiFpskotugnGFdoGnvQI_k0WRRbcEMpsv8TPoMifnvKYZAA50dGKP9azVCGHMHLdIWabiuMev0kZTzchi6_7612aMb0cVSOm9UCAKfAnnWiYtBpMcsAe4zCdN7gFy99XH891NUsRO0GhrDK2Gg3cuoU3D_kJaeEh7B7snNbDK8SLzon_MO_q7kkSaCH27Wul89hjrlWLCN37Y5i65LnpQ%3D%3D "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

name: =?utf-8?Q?Washington=20State=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: WSRP June Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WSRP Monthly Update - Events | Ways to get involved | Join the team | and more! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f5fa5462a3&e=6a281f566d)
---
|
---
|
## Upcoming Events
---
|
---
|
### 46th Annual Dinner
---
| | Mark your calendars! We are excited to announce that our 46th Annual Dinner will be held on October 27th, 2023 at the Bellevue Regency Hyatt. [We hope you will join us at this yearly gathering!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4a1b6cc4df&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
This year, we're thrilled to have Congressman Burgess Owens (UT-04) as our keynote speaker. Owens, an outspoken champion of conservative values, brings with him a wealth of insight and vision that encapsulates the spirit of our party. His compelling journey from NFL Super Bowl Champion to the halls of Congress is a testament to the power of perseverance and belief in American values.
---
| |
---
Adding to the excitement of the evening, we will also be honoring Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers with our annual Courage Award. Representative Cathy McMorris Rodgers has been a bulwark of conservative leadership, embodying a steadfast dedication to her constituents in Washington's 5th congressional district. Her tireless work as a national leader and Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee continues to impact national policy positively.
---
| We can't wait for you to join us at this event. It's going to be an incredible evening of celebrating the principles that make our party strong, hearing from inspiring leaders, and charting the course for our party's future.
---
| [Register Now: 46th Annual Dinner](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=86345012ce&e=6a281f566d "Register Now: 46th Annual Dinner")
---
|
---
|
### Heart of the Party
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a225f9852a&e=6a281f566d)
---
| 🌟 [June 27th: Heart of the Party Reception - Spokane](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=13875b4259&e=6a281f566d): Come and meet Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers, U.S. Representative for Washington's 5th congressional district, amd Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee at our 5th Annual Heart of the Party Reception in Spokane. Rep. McMorris Rodgers is a national leader and this is a great opportunity to hear the imact she is having on national policy. Come and connect with fellow Republicans and share your thoughts on the future of our party.

🌟 [July 14th: Heart of the Party Reception - Lynden](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a3cc5c29ba&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Whatcom County for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like Whatcom County Sheriff Bill Elfo and Lynden Mayor Scott Korthuis. We will also be joined by Whatcom County Young Repbulican Chair Ashley Butenschoen. This is your chance to learn more about what we are doing as a party, hang out with fellow Republicans, and show your support!

🌟 [July 21st: Heart of the Party Reception - Maple Valley](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a2f8dff5f7&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Maple Valley for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn, Kent City Councilman Bill Boyce. This is your chance to learn more about their vision for our great state and show your support.

🌟[September 14th: Heart of the Party Reception - Yakima](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1a14b40255&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Yakima for an evening with Republican elected officials like State Representative Alex Ybarra and Yakima County Commissioner Amanda McKinney along with other local candidates. This is your chance to support the Washington State Republican Party, our elected officials, and great candidates in the Yakima area!
---
| [More Info: 2023 Heart of the Party Events](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cf9b3b1a56&e=6a281f566d "More Info: 2023 Heart of the Party Events")
---
|
---
|
## Get Involved
---
| Get involved - join our Political Director at one of his upcoming volunteer trainings, [register now](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=30706c4ba4&e=6a281f566d) or contact Matthew Frohlich at [matthew@wsrp.org](mailto:matthew@wsrp.org) for more information! Upcoming dates and locations include:
* June 19th at 6:30PM in South Lake Stevens
* June 20th at 8:30PM via Zoom
* June 21st at 6:30PM at Pierce County GOP
* June 22nd at 7:30PM via Zoom

* June 28th at 7:30PM via Zoom

With more dates and locations being scheduled!
