|
## Referendum 101
---
|
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9eef6a8259&e=6a281f566d)
---
| **BIG NEWS: We're officially backing[Referendum 101](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=36df4db4e7&e=6a281f566d), a crucial initiative aimed at safeguarding parental rights and ensuring responsible care for Washington's youth. **This referendum is set to remove Senate Bill 5599 from Washington State law. This bill alarmingly allows shelters and host homes to house runaway or homeless youth without parental notification or consent.

SB 5599 represents an overreach by the state that infringes upon parental rights. It's an unsettling illustration of the state's disregard for parental discretion and its misplaced priorities.

Here's where we need your assistance – to get Referendum 101 on the ballot, we need to gather [200,000 signatures](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c3d8a80032&e=6a281f566d)** by July 15th.** With your involvement, we are confident that we can achieve it. We're asking all of our dedicated supporters to sign and distribute petitions for Referendum 101.

Together, we can bring this issue to the people and guarantee the protection of parental rights and responsible care for our youth. Take a stand and say NO to SB 5599. [Take a moment to find a signing location near you - or request an initiative form directly from the Reject 5599 website HERE.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f69c9ecb3&e=6a281f566d)
---
|
---
|
# Join the Team!
---
| One of the most meaningful ways you can help us make a difference is by [becoming a monthly contributor](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2a143eb95f&e=6a281f566d). Your recurring donation ensures we have the reliable resources to fight for the values we share, such as limited government, individual freedom, and responsible fiscal stewardship.

Whether it's advocating for parental rights, endorsing candidates who uphold our constitution, or rallying support for pivotal referendums, it's your support that makes it all possible.

[No contribution is too small – whether it's ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5c5d761ee8&e=6a281f566d)[$5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1465fe36f1&e=6a281f566d), [$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=78dfd3a8d8&e=6a281f566d), [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=11fb5fbf4c&e=6a281f566d), [or more, each dollar amplifies our efforts and gets us one step closer to achieving our goals. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=85bc5afb8f&e=6a281f566d)Make your mark on Washington's political landscape by joining the team and becoming a monthly contributor today.

clean_body: WSRP Monthly Update - Events | Ways to get involved | Join the team | and more! | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | | 46th Annual Dinner | | Mark your calendars! We are excited to announce that our 46th Annual Dinner will be held on October 27th, 2023 at the Bellevue Regency Hyatt. | | This year, we're thrilled to have Congressman Burgess Owens (UT-04) as our keynote speaker. Owens, an outspoken champion of conservative values, brings with him a wealth of insight and vision that encapsulates the spirit of our party. His compelling journey from NFL Super Bowl Champion to the halls of Congress is a testament to the power of perseverance and belief in American values. | | Adding to the excitement of the evening, we will also be honoring Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers with our annual Courage Award. Representative Cathy McMorris Rodgers has been a bulwark of conservative leadership, embodying a steadfast dedication to her constituents in Washington's 5th congressional district. Her tireless work as a national leader and Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee continues to impact national policy positively. | We can't wait for you to join us at this event. It's going to be an incredible evening of celebrating the principles that make our party strong, hearing from inspiring leaders, and charting the course for our party's future. | "Register Now: 46th Annual Dinner" | | Heart of the Party | | 🌟 : Come and meet Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers, U.S. Representative for Washington's 5th congressional district, amd Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee at our 5th Annual Heart of the Party Reception in Spokane. Rep. McMorris Rodgers is a national leader and this is a great opportunity to hear the imact she is having on national policy. Come and connect with fellow Republicans and share your thoughts on the future of our party. 🌟 : Join us in Whatcom County for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like Whatcom County Sheriff Bill Elfo and Lynden Mayor Scott Korthuis. We will also be joined by Whatcom County Young Repbulican Chair Ashley Butenschoen. This is your chance to learn more about what we are doing as a party, hang out with fellow Republicans, and show your support! 🌟 : Join us in Maple Valley for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn, Kent City Councilman Bill Boyce. This is your chance to learn more about their vision for our great state and show your support. 🌟: Join us in Yakima for an evening with Republican elected officials like State Representative Alex Ybarra and Yakima County Commissioner Amanda McKinney along with other local candidates. This is your chance to support the Washington State Republican Party, our elected officials, and great candidates in the Yakima area! | "More Info: 2023 Heart of the Party Events" | | Get Involved | Get involved - join our Political Director at one of his upcoming volunteer trainings, or contact Matthew Frohlich at mailto:matthew@wsrp.org for more information! Upcoming dates and locations include: June 19th at 6:30PM in South Lake Stevens June 20th at 8:30PM via Zoom June 21st at 6:30PM at Pierce County GOP June 22nd at 7:30PM via Zoom June 26th at 7:30PM via Zoom June 27th at 7:30PM via Zoom June 28th at 7:30PM via Zoom June 29th at 7:30PM via Zoom June 30th at 7:30PM via Zoom July 11th at 6:00PM in Vancouver With more dates and locations being scheduled! | "Join the Team - Sign up for a Grassroots Leadership Training Today!" | | Referendum 101 | | | BIG NEWS: We're officially backing, a crucial initiative aimed at safeguarding parental rights and ensuring responsible care for Washington's youth. This referendum is set to remove Senate Bill 5599 from Washington State law. This bill alarmingly allows shelters and host homes to house runaway or homeless youth without parental notification or consent. SB 5599 represents an overreach by the state that infringes upon parental rights. It's an unsettling illustration of the state's disregard for parental discretion and its misplaced priorities. Here's where we need your assistance – to get Referendum 101 on the ballot, we need to gather by July 15th. With your involvement, we are confident that we can achieve it. We're asking all of our dedicated supporters to sign and distribute petitions for Referendum 101. Together, we can bring this issue to the people and guarantee the protection of parental rights and responsible care for our youth. Take a stand and say NO to SB 5599. | | Join the Team! | One of the most meaningful ways you can help us make a difference is by . Your recurring donation ensures we have the reliable resources to fight for the values we share, such as limited government, individual freedom, and responsible fiscal stewardship. Whether it's advocating for parental rights, endorsing candidates who uphold our constitution, or rallying support for pivotal referendums, it's your support that makes it all possible. , , , your mark on Washington's political landscape by joining the team and becoming a monthly contributor today. | "Join our Grassroots Club - Become a Monthly Donor Today!" | | WSRP Storefront | | | In the News: | National Local WAGOP in the news | | "Contribute to our efforts to elect Republicans in 2023 and beyond!" | Contact: Benjamin Gonzalez Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 mailto:ben@wsrp.org | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Preparing to close the books on quarter two…

body:
I am proud of my bipartisan work in Congress. Now, I need your help to ensure I can continue fighting for all Americans in the House.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64984726/411917296/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU4MTU0ZDctMjgwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F_PdNmqjjg3XicjmSt9Je9RzkebdiDHtA3KQGM4KHxg=&emci=83ee16b8-600c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=de8154d7-280d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

While Kevin McCarthy and House Freedom Caucus Republicans are in disarray and at constant odds, I am doing everything I can to make sure Congress is actually _working_ for the American people. In fact, my bipartisan work was recently recognized in _The Seattle Times._

It's no secret that I'm willing to work with anyone, anywhere, to make progress on the issues we all care about. Unfortunately, too many extreme politicians in Congress don't share that belief, and that's why I'm determined to help Democrats take back the House in 2024.**That work starts right now.**

I know Election Day seems far off — **but we are nearing the halfway mark to 2024. I'm counting on this grassroots team's support to help put our campaign in a strong position heading into July.**

**[McCarthy's antics are a constant reminder of what happens when partisan games go ahead of what's best for the American people. So if you're ready to take back the House Majority, will you chip in $5 to our campaign before tonight's mid-month deadline? Peter, I know with your help we will be able to hit the ground running in July.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64984727/411917297/1071353790?refcode=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230616_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=de8154d7-280d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU4MTU0ZDctMjgwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F_PdNmqjjg3XicjmSt9Je9RzkebdiDHtA3KQGM4KHxg=)**

Chris Pappas consistently faces Republican challengers who are anti-choice, anti-worker, and anti-LGBTQ+

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64985324/411919811/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ5YzcxNy0yYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE53-ch4Qht5jyivwG7_gZ6pi_RSF8mKLciAAWgmPC8=&emci=90bcbd5e-4b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bdd9c717-2a0d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, In 2018, Chris Pappas made history when he was elected as the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent New Hampshire in Congress. And in 2022, Vermonters followed suit when they elected me as their congresswoman. **As representatives from neighboring states, LGBTQ+ leaders, and fierce advocates for the protection and expansion of LGBTQ+ rights, we must stick together.** [_**Chris consistently faces Republican challengers who are anti-choice, anti-worker, and anti-LGBTQ+ – and he will once again need our help to keep his competitive seat blue in 2024. Peter — will you split a contribution between Chris Pappas and me to help us keep fighting for the fundamental freedoms of all Americans in Washington?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64985325/411919812/-1995730026?&refcode=E3032-20230617-PappasSplit-SL-LGBTQRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ5YzcxNy0yYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE53-ch4Qht5jyivwG7_gZ6pi_RSF8mKLciAAWgmPC8=) **[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64985326/411919813/-1995730026?&refcode=E3032-20230617-PappasSplit-SB-LGBTQRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ5YzcxNy0yYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE53-ch4Qht5jyivwG7_gZ6pi_RSF8mKLciAAWgmPC8=)** **As our LGBTQ+ communities face an onslaught of attacks — ranging from hateful legislation to violence — it’s more important than ever that we uplift LGBTQ+ trailblazers and leaders.** Chris and I are two of _just 11_ openly LGBTQ+ members of Congress, so we know how critical it is that we stand up for our communities and protect and expand LGBTQ+ representation in Congress. During his time in Congress, he has helped introduce and pass the Equality Act in the House, supported enacting the Respect for Marriage Act into law, and led the SERVE Act to guarantee VA benefits for LGBTQ+ veterans. Despite his strong record, Chris is no stranger to tough races. Just last year, he narrowly defeated Karoline Leavitt — a former Trump aide, anti-abortion extremist, proud election denier, and advocate for anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. Chris is sure to face another tough race this cycle, so we need to support him! [_**Peter, can you rush a split contribution to my campaign and Chris Pappas? clean_body: Chris Pappas consistently faces Republican challengers who are anti-choice, anti-worker, and anti-LGBTQ+ | | Peter, In 2018, Chris Pappas made history when he was elected as the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent New Hampshire in Congress. And in 2022, Vermonters followed suit when they elected me as their congresswoman. As representatives from neighboring states, LGBTQ+ leaders, and fierce advocates for the protection and expansion of LGBTQ+ rights, we must stick together. = = As our LGBTQ+ communities face an onslaught of attacks — ranging from hateful legislation to violence — it’s more important than ever that we uplift LGBTQ+ trailblazers and leaders. Chris and I are two of just 11 openly LGBTQ+ members of Congress, so we know how critical it is that we stand up for our communities and protect and expand LGBTQ+ representation in Congress. During his time in Congress, he has helped introduce and pass the Equality Act in the House, supported enacting the Respect for Marriage Act into law, and led the SERVE Act to guarantee VA benefits for LGBTQ+ veterans. Despite his strong record, Chris is no stranger to tough races. Just last year, he narrowly defeated Karoline Leavitt — a former Trump aide, anti-abortion extremist, proud election denier, and advocate for anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. Chris is sure to face another tough race this cycle, so we need to support him! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: Team Crow
subject: [Poll] Do you support banning assault weapons?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

There’s a headline about a new mass shooting every week.

In Colorado. And Texas. And Kentucky. And California.

Gun manufacturers want us to think we need weapons of war. Don’t be fooled.

As a combat veteran, Jason has used assault weapons and had them used on him. These types of weapons used in war have no place in our communities.

How many more have to die in our malls, schools, and grocery stores before there’s real change? It’s time to get assault weapons off our streets.

Jason and our team want to hear from you: Do you support banning assault weapons?

Your response will be recorded immediately after clicking:

YES! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-thanks-2023?refcode2=yes] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-thanks-2023?refcode2=no]

Thank you for your timely response,

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-june-2023]

name: The Republican Team
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-Nvdno7qxTMmgolCwlnQodjSJdbIEUG0mh9N8Xd-jc9b3H--D7vM5XF1N8LO8ui22lzaXOJc9JFue_h3XLMgTZtzajQhoUD2Bm6oOdDAbiXizwySgCBtWvllGrG4I6aQ7ozmcFd9Ze7uInkYmxj_b4UQwGGAzh6JwJQeu70kCTItNNyiUprY5tlSL785aid48mLo9-y32ya2t77eilw0uHlyr-WWQs2_IU8dtjy9HXY3nUdPExdPR6ffswhCfADln-kkkTQV9s2L9iSrHyAV-yi-mX1P6t4ycAAP__tl5k3w) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-Nvdno7qxTMmgolCwlnQodjSJdbIEUG0mh9N8Xd-jc9b3H--D7vM5XF1N8LO8ui22lzaXOJc9JFue_h3XLMgTZtzajQhoUD2Bm6oOdDAbiXizwySgCBtWvllGrG4I6aQ7ozmcFd9Ze7uInkYmxj_b4UQwGGAzh6JwJQeu70kCTItNNyiUprY5tlSL785aid48mLo9-y32ya2t77eilw0uHlyr-WWQs2_IU8dtjy9HXY3nUdPExdPR6ffswhCfADln-kkkTQV9s2L9iSrHyAV-yi-mX1P6t4ycAAP__tl5k3w) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkDFrwzAQhX-Nvdno7qxTMmgolCwlnQodjSJdbIEUG0mh9N8Xd-jc9b3H--D7vM5XF1N8LO8ui22lzaXOJc9JFue_h3XLMgTZtzajQhoUD2Bm6oOdDAbiXizwySgCBtWvllGrG4I6aQ7ozmcFd9Ze7uInkYmxj_b4UQwGGAzh6JwJQeu70kCTItNNyiUprY5tlSL785aid48mLo9-y32ya2t77eilw0uHlyr-WWQs2_IU8dtjy9HXY3nUdPExdPR6ffswhCfADln-kkkTQV9s2L9iSrHyAV-yi-mX1P6t4ycAAP__tl5k3w)

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Change is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Nearly HALF of the voting-age population will be Millennials or Gen Z by the 2024 election.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64985690/411921045/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230617Youth_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjNmMTA5LTJiMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3cB-9pJhY2cHMvhp7zeI2Rfu6KF7TfZoXuGuOCUuLok=)
| Fellow activist,

Over the past decade, Gen Z and Millennial voters have become a central part of not just the Democratic electorate, but the electorate at large. In 2020, they made up 41.5% of the voting-age population and **saved our democracy.**

In 2024, they’re projected to grow to 48.5% — **nearly half of the potential electorate across the country.**

Youth voters are standing up and speaking out on the issues and policies that affect them, including climate and environmental justice, student debt, gun reform and abortion access. This electorate is going to change the future of this country. How soon that change comes rests on how many turn out to vote, and when and where they do it.

Every community deserves to have their voices heard in government, and allowing the youth to embrace their power by registering to vote and in turn voting their values is a big part of why we do this work.

It’s also what makes me so proud to say **we helped make Pennsylvania one of just four states where young voters, especially youth voters of color, turned out at a higher rate in 2022 than in 2018.** **[Will you donate $10 today to help us continue engaging with young voters and especially young voters of color year-round to achieve a more reflective democracy that works for clean_body: Nearly HALF of the voting-age population will be Millennials or Gen Z by the 2024 election. = | Fellow activist, Over the past decade, Gen Z and Millennial voters have become a central part of not just the Democratic electorate, but the electorate at large. In 2020, they made up 41.5% of the voting-age population and saved our democracy. In 2024, they’re projected to grow to 48.5% — nearly half of the potential electorate across the country. Youth voters are standing up and speaking out on the issues and policies that affect them, including climate and environmental justice, student debt, gun reform and abortion access. This electorate is going to change the future of this country. How soon that change comes rests on how many turn out to vote, and when and where they do it. Every community deserves to have their voices heard in government, and allowing the youth to embrace their power by registering to vote and in turn voting their values is a big part of why we do this work. It’s also what makes me so proud to say we helped make Pennsylvania one of just four states where young voters, especially youth voters of color, turned out at a higher rate in 2022 than in 2018. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner = | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. * * *
Peter, under Tate Reeves’ watch, millions of dollars of taxpayer money was stolen and went into the pockets of his long-time personal trainer and close friends.

Then Reeves had the audacity to fire the investigator who was fighting to recover that money – and replace him with one of his campaign donors.

_It's the biggest corruption scandal in Mississippi history._

Then Reeves had the audacity to fire the investigator who was fighting to recover that money – and replace him with one of his campaign donors. It's the biggest corruption scandal in Mississippi history. Now, here's the kicker: Reeves is running for re-election, and he’s betting on his special interest buddies and wealthy pals to help him snag another term. But let's keep it real, who would stand by a corrupt politician like him? body:
Here’s why the IL GOP is trying to rebrand mail-in voting...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64987576/411922769/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230617Rebrand_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY4Y2YyMjUtMmQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lTX3yWnCXHLajvskOaGSRqe60rSHL0u-AiwHsTLND6w=)
Fellow Democrats,

A few months ago, we shared with you the IL GOP leadership’s scramble to find a way to flip-flop their position and convince their MAGA base to adopt mail-in voting despite their ridiculous lies about mail-ballot fraud.

That back-track scheme has now gone national, and the IL GOP couldn’t be more excited to join the rebrand efforts:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64987577/411922770/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230617Rebrand_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY4Y2YyMjUtMmQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lTX3yWnCXHLajvskOaGSRqe60rSHL0u-AiwHsTLND6w=)
**[There’s a big reason the IL GOP is so invested in this rebrand – mail-in voting increases voter turn-out. The GOP continues to pay a heavy electoral price every cycle due to their misinformation about mail-in voting; thus, they are changing their tune. The IDCCA and our County Parties have always supported voting rights. Mail-in voting is an integral part of the right to vote. We need your help this cycle so the IL GOP can’t claim success with their johnny-come-lately efforts. Contribute $10 today to help us. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64987578/411922771/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230617Rebrand_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY4Y2YyMjUtMmQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lTX3yWnCXHLajvskOaGSRqe60rSHL0u-AiwHsTLND6w=)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64987579/411922772/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230617Rebrand_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY4Y2YyMjUtMmQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lTX3yWnCXHLajvskOaGSRqe60rSHL0u-AiwHsTLND6w=)
Expanding access to voting leads to more voter participation. Democrats believe everyone who is legally eligible to vote should have the opportunity to vote.

The IL GOP’s outlandish lies about mail-in voting **backfired spectacularly,** convincing many of their supporters their only option to vote successfully was to vote in person on a single Tuesday or **not at all.** Combined with the lack of enthusiasm for extreme GOP candidates, it contributed to Democratic victories. This changes when they embrace a fuller range of access to the ballot.

Election after election, the IDCCA and our County Parties have run extremely successful vote-by-mail programs and helped voters make their voices heard and exercise their right to vote.

**[In 2022, recipients of our targeted vote-by-mail campaign turned out at a rate of 75%, helping elect down-ballot Democrats and pass the Worker’s Rights Amendment. With millions of dollars being spent on many single races these days, it’s clear why the IL GOP is so desperate to run their own rebranded vote-by-mail program. As more GOP jump on board to vote-by-mail, we must remain focused on our efforts. Will you donate $10 right now to help us ramp up our mail-in voting program for 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64987580/411922773/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230617Rebrand_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY4Y2YyMjUtMmQwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lTX3yWnCXHLajvskOaGSRqe60rSHL0u-AiwHsTLND6w=)**

clean_body: Here’s why the IL GOP is trying to rebrand mail-in voting... = Fellow Democrats, A few months ago, we shared with you the IL GOP leadership’s scramble to find a way to flip-flop their position and convince their MAGA base to adopt mail-in voting despite their ridiculous lies about mail-ballot fraud. That back-track scheme has now gone national, and the IL GOP couldn’t be more excited to join the rebrand efforts: = = = Expanding access to voting leads to more voter participation. Democrats believe everyone who is legally eligible to vote should have the opportunity to vote. The IL GOP’s outlandish lies about mail-in voting backfired spectacularly, convincing many of their supporters their only option to vote successfully was to vote in person on a single Tuesday or not at all. Combined with the lack of enthusiasm for extreme GOP candidates, it contributed to Democratic victories. This changes when they embrace a fuller range of access to the ballot. Election after election, the IDCCA and our County Parties have run extremely successful vote-by-mail programs and helped voters make their voices heard and exercise their right to vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you, Team IDCCA | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Team, Juan Ciscomani's voting record tells us everything we need to know about his priorities. In just the five months since he arrived in Washington DC, he's voted:
✅ For nationwide abortion restrictions
✅ Against common-sense gun safety measures
✅ To cut funding for education, veterans, and senior services
Kirsten Engel's opponent cares more about making Kevin McCarthy happy than his own constituents.
Flipping this seat won't be easy, friend, but together, we can get it done.
We'll need a strong network of grassroots support to win in 2024. Every dollar makes a difference. If you want to help elect a leader who will actually fight for us, please consider donating now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_061723_VotingRecord_act]

name: Joe Biden
subject: Hope to see you soon! →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
My team is going to pick someone to come meet us in our nation’s capital, all expenses covered for you and a friend. | | |
---
My favorite part of running for office is getting to talk to folks all over the country about their lives, their passions, the things that keep them going. It’s about the people. It’s about you, Peter. **So I wanted to ask: Would you like to meet Jill and me? My team is going to pick someone to come meet us in our nation’s capital, with hotel and travel expenses covered for you and a guest. Chip in any amount below to enter to win →**

clean_body: My team is going to pick someone to come meet us in our nation’s capital, all expenses covered for you and a friend. | | | My favorite part of running for office is getting to talk to folks all over the country about their lives, their passions, the things that keep them going. It’s about the people. It’s about you, Peter. So I wanted to ask: Would you like to meet Jill and me? My team is going to pick someone to come meet us in our nation’s capital, with hotel and travel expenses covered for you and a guest. Chip in any amount below to enter to win → | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I wish I had the chance to sit down and have a conversation with all of our campaign’s supporters. But our days on the campaign trail are jam-packed, so I hope you enter to win this one, Peter. Our team will cover the costs of travel and accommodations. Just come prepared to join me and Jill for some good company (and a selfie of course!) Hope to see you soon! Joe Joe Biden

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Once again, all eyes will be on Wisconsin in the next election. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Control of the White House and the Senate could all come down to Wisconsin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=424%2E35263%2EgtynH3)
Peter — Wisconsin, now more than ever, is considered a bellwether state for elections. Campaigning here is more competitive than ever before **[(and more expensive too! So if you can pitch in to my campaign, I’d appreciate it).](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230617_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=424%2E35263%2EgtynH3)** | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230617_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=424%2E35263%2EgtynH3)
---
In the last two presidential elections, the margin of victory has been _**less than one point** _here in Wisconsin. In 2016, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. Four years later, Wisconsin voters helped send President Joe Biden to the White House.
The _Washington Post_ even wrote an article recently about Door County — which is _one of only nine counties_ across the country to have voted for the winning presidential candidate in every election since 2000.
Peter, it comes as no surprise that election experts and strategists are saying that Wisconsin could, once again, be the “tipping point” state in the 2024 election.
**Control of the White House and the Senate could all come down to Wisconsin. The weight of this campaign isn’t lost on me.**
The road ahead won’t always be easy. Republicans will do and spend whatever it takes to win Wisconsin’s 10 electoral votes and flip my Senate seat along the way. But with you on my side, I know we’ll cross the finish line victorious next year.
To get there, we’ll need to roll up our sleeves and put in hard work. We’ll need to knock on thousands of doors, make countless phone calls, and do everything in our power to reach voters any way we can.
**[All of this will require a lot of grassroots fundraising support — that’s where you come in! I would appreciate it if you could pitch in a few dollars to my reelection campaign today. Any amount goes a long way to helping us keep Door County and all of Wisconsin blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230617_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=424%2E35263%2EgtynH3)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jun23.ORXv9s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230617_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=424%2E35263%2EgtynH3)

body:
We must fight for LGBTQIA+ rights everywhere.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64991135/411924487/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230617Pride_N_ML_90do_5_G_B_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWU4Njc4NS0yZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdCPotSqfflFuUGAE-RZkMMJiSQqVX02wpaX8cODgA8=)
Team, it’s up to all of us to stand up for the LGBTQIA+ community in Pride Month and beyond.
A historic wave of hateful Republican legislation, cheered on by outright calls for “extermination,” is turning LGBTQIA+ people into refugees in our own nation.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64991136/411924494/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230617Pride_N_ML_90do_5_G_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWU4Njc4NS0yZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdCPotSqfflFuUGAE-RZkMMJiSQqVX02wpaX8cODgA8=)
**[This is a direct result of the power the far right has been allowed to garner in state legislatures across the country, but their power is not unassailable. Could you chip in $10 or more today to help us contest these extremists and fight back for LGBTQIA+ rights?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64991137/411924502/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230617Pride_N_ML_90do_5_G_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWU4Njc4NS0yZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdCPotSqfflFuUGAE-RZkMMJiSQqVX02wpaX8cODgA8=)**
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64991140/411924504/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230617Pride_N_ML_90do_5_G_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWU4Njc4NS0yZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdCPotSqfflFuUGAE-RZkMMJiSQqVX02wpaX8cODgA8=)
Anti-LGBTQIA+ bills are growing rampant, along with hateful rhetoric, and it will continue to be that way as long as far-right officials have a stronghold on these red states.
Thousands of right-wing candidates win their races every year simply because they do not have a challenger.
That is why it is so important to Contest Every Bigot by recruiting candidates everywhere and supporting LGBTQIA+ advocacy groups in states that need it the most. We’re doing both, and we proudly stand by our partners like Fairness WV, who are on the very front lines of the fight for everyone’s right to be open, honest, and safe.
**[No one should be forced to leave their home because of hatred and extremism. We must continue the fight against injustice this and every month. Will you donate $10 or more right away to help us win the fight for LGBTQIA+ rights in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64991142/411924507/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230617Pride_N_ML_90do_5_G_B_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWU4Njc4NS0yZjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdCPotSqfflFuUGAE-RZkMMJiSQqVX02wpaX8cODgA8=)**

clean_body: We must fight for LGBTQIA+ rights everywhere. = Team, it’s up to all of us to stand up for the LGBTQIA+ community in Pride Month and beyond. A historic wave of hateful Republican legislation, cheered on by outright calls for “extermination,” is turning LGBTQIA+ people into refugees in our own nation. = = = Anti-LGBTQIA+ bills are growing rampant, along with hateful rhetoric, and it will continue to be that way as long as far-right officials have a stronghold on these red states. Thousands of right-wing candidates win their races every year simply because they do not have a challenger. That is why it is so important to Contest Every Bigot by recruiting candidates everywhere and supporting LGBTQIA+ advocacy groups in states that need it the most. We’re doing both, and we proudly stand by our partners like Fairness WV, who are on the very front lines of the fight for everyone’s right to be open, honest, and safe. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you, Movement Labs || Rapid Resist Action 5515 S. **Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election, We need 56 more responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you. Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an $80,000 Maserati SUV around D.C., but he also lives on a $700,000 houseboat in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants. American people are paying the price. Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene. Please, if you can, We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign. Respectfully, Team Justice | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Why this Pride Month is so important
body:
This Pride Month is a time to honor the hard-won victories of the LGBTQ community, who continue to fight for the right to love and live as they would like to.
| | |
---
Derek, this Pride Month is a time to honor the hard-won victories of the LGBTQ community, which continues to fight for the right to love and live as they would like to. **Today, this feels especially important, as our nation is embroiled in another ugly clash regarding gender norms, particularly as they relate to children, teachers, and the LGTBQ community. **
As you probably already know, my daughter, Molly, is gay. Last fall, she married the incredible woman who is now her wife, and the two began a life together. When I was elected to Congress, I made a promise to Molly to do everything in my power to protect and defend the LGBTQ community. It’s one of the reasons I helped the House pass the historic Equality Act to guarantee all LGBTQ Americans the full protection of federal civil rights laws. And it's why I won’t stop until the Equality Act is signed into law.
Amid these renewed attacks on the LGTBQ community, I ask my fellow parents, educators, and lawmakers to simply love one another and embrace our differences, regardless of gender identity, race, ethnicity, background, or sexual orientation. In a just America, love is love. That’s what I’m fighting for right now, Derek – I hope you’ll join me.
My family, and so many families across our great country, are stronger for it.

Happy Pride Month! There is work to be done.

Chrissy

name: Jon Tester
subject: I'm the Senate's only seven-fingered dirt firmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64993988/411929520/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2710-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5NDUzNDE4LTMxMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RoSqS5Hrh_avL-dwNeGV44L5TQvRn0FmhXOCiwyRoq4=)
Hello,

I’m sure your inbox is flooded with messages about the upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I want to take a minute to say something different: **I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re part of this grassroots team.**

Without you, I wouldn’t have been elected as the Senate’s only seven-fingered dirt farmer, and I _definitely_ wouldn’t have won reelection in a state Donald Trump carried twice.

I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result: we’ve invested in infrastructure and education. We’ve lowered health care costs. We’ve fought back against inflation and helped working families get the support they need – whether they live on a farm like me or in a big city.

_You_ helped make all of this possible – thank you.
**But there is still work to be done.****** Hardworking families are still struggling to stay afloat, and small businesses are still fighting to survive. And instead of working to actually solve these problems, national politicians are proposing dumb-as-rocks ideas like a national sales tax. I’m running for reelection because Montanans have worked too hard these past few years to let the GOP take us backward.

So I need to thank you in advance for supporting my reelection campaign. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone.

**I’m the most vulnerable senator up for reelection next year, and if we’re going to win, it’ll take all of us working together – just like we always do.**

**[I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC ahead of tonight's end-of-month fundraising deadline and help keep me in the Senate delivering for Montana?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64993989/411929521/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2710-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5NDUzNDE4LTMxMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RoSqS5Hrh_avL-dwNeGV44L5TQvRn0FmhXOCiwyRoq4=)**

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single existing majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By chipping in _today,_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Cori Bush
subject: My father’s pro-Black activism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
I grew up learning about Black history and Black role models who challenged the status quo. | |
---
Peter, Tomorrow is Father’s Day, and I’m feeling grateful for my father Errol Bush, who made sure my siblings and I grew up learning about Black history and Black role models who challenged the status quo. Growing up, I knocked on doors with my father as he ran for office, and I watched him be elected alderman and then mayor of our community in St. Louis County. **As a public servant, my father also participated in protests where he put his body on the line for racial justice.** When speaking at my 2018 campaign launch to serve in the House of Representatives, he remarked about the momentum we activists had built as part of the Ferguson Uprising. **The Ferguson Uprising was a pivotal point in the centuries-long struggle for Black liberation in our country** , and it transformed what we thought was possible for our communities. I bring that transformative vision to my service in Congress. **This weekend, while celebrating Juneteenth and the ongoing struggle for freedom, I’m renewing the push for reparations for Black people in the United States.** [**Chip in today to help us carry on the struggle for Black liberation and racial justice.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wo00NtbdwdeVt8sTYEy1O-mUkJ_W5U2lxgzZgDf6SumRLELS7mAXlm3yZ2kpizAn36St3YD-0nVX4wpEolhKkU7YplfOthQoFtWnbt8dWBFDXVTuPex3PDffSn72iDXb270jGHP4JXa_5pBzjcoBaRM1_58c4ol1-cvabAYGAxcvrExB2ez3t1wffnqT5bhTXYF0AKvGM3q7odD6yvkZ1-0VSoWH2_TRgBrEQO9aFlkJEWfT8S21JkTw73qQEfjFQOGMr8A_XINhbmqDdgemsl95phzzhjppzB7rxo1ECuUc3wf31CGs1bfcUOaI0ToN4/3x4/HVx37Z41R1Co_E1lrEm2Og/h0/nqJ9F7ky4qo1sdKwE-Y9jT-cAmkVuoAi781ONFG0-mU)******** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zxUEqtKzccfTroq-vye_-MkXz4lxs2Q91b_nNeqtwiGzK9PuyIRSPxghm7M6TF7maiFtlq-C06_Grq6ZzpB3nmI1-oYF8bmpytle1OQZvo0T19ImgPYkcjOEBhEvGdAUUNQUVQ0OCEQIoZpps4A-lCX2D6q5blhw2xhtvx2c0lKdpc60Uv6CfSnMTFsngyQ0s0aggv3Mv2s7L9o33_lCiOyojZvMc3R97n7YsJXYB86uEG9_aes_j7H58f9twoJ_b2Twvo2Grg0Oyz0oJwpOJ-p8AANqdF0hIr82hf0KRxamYeqv8CVPh1mtsNCNPMPI8/3x4/HVx37Z41R1Co_E1lrEm2Og/h1/evWk-AHxahAA-hD_w4GpR9R6Cs3R4Su3cWMSJAFHiTw) **[DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wo00NtbdwdeVt8sTYEy1O-mUkJ_W5U2lxgzZgDf6SumRYJ-m5Q7DBWMj6OFxONIqCeYjwPjPCnkS1q_Fbx8_XCzuFoPIV3hHal60nKdMu-BksiPS9gVkkt8pFoWiFTs646E9wKQkUoAGy-VEE7JJ0KtdRkm2J1_UDqfSdZwtX_ANFhJL0F8z1h1fa9FjM1izLez6HgQGkGvzNoa9ceW9GNS3fbrRmnQFPnjkzWO_G3g7fepc7pI7TtyWXaklBEojdMFyHBa-_E9Zu4I5Cpz_iXd3Y8Y89w2j6Tt4SX0t-64WQXbE69Nmkupp8cl-s3TxI/3x4/HVx37Z41R1Co_E1lrEm2Og/h2/E_TBEI_B6QSThUNqcLeLW6fVL0AUw7HYTYfyMvNSqWw)** During my time in Congress, I’ve put forward policies to invest in Black communities and address generations of trauma in the face of white supremacy and state violence. I’m still the same Cori who rose up with my community in response to the police killing of Michael Brown, coming together in the tradition of our ancestors who’ve pushed for a better world. In the Ferguson Uprising, Black people took to the streets to express outrage, grief, and frustration with a system that was never designed for us. We stood against years of injustice and racial inequality, and we found that together, we have the power to bring about the change our lives depend on. Throughout my life, I have personally experienced trauma and systemic racism in education, in healthcare, in housing, at work, and at the hands (and boots) of police. I know what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet, and I carry that urgency with me in Congress as I refuse to accept the status quo. [**Can you donate today to help grow our movement for collective liberation? clean_body: I grew up learning about Black history and Black role models who challenged the status quo. | | Peter, Tomorrow is Father’s Day, and I’m feeling grateful for my father Errol Bush, who made sure my siblings and I grew up learning about Black history and Black role models who challenged the status quo. Growing up, I knocked on doors with my father as he ran for office, and I watched him be elected alderman and then mayor of our community in St. Louis County. As a public servant, my father also participated in protests where he put his body on the line for racial justice. When speaking at my 2018 campaign launch to serve in the House of Representatives, he remarked about the momentum we activists had built as part of the Ferguson Uprising. The Ferguson Uprising was a pivotal point in the centuries-long struggle for Black liberation in our country , and it transformed what we thought was possible for our communities. I bring that transformative vision to my service in Congress. This weekend, while celebrating Juneteenth and the ongoing struggle for freedom, I’m renewing the push for reparations for Black people in the United States. ****** During my time in Congress, I’ve put forward policies to invest in Black communities and address generations of trauma in the face of white supremacy and state violence. I’m still the same Cori who rose up with my community in response to the police killing of Michael Brown, coming together in the tradition of our ancestors who’ve pushed for a better world. In the Ferguson Uprising, Black people took to the streets to express outrage, grief, and frustration with a system that was never designed for us. We stood against years of injustice and racial inequality, and we found that together, we have the power to bring about the change our lives depend on. Throughout my life, I have personally experienced trauma and systemic racism in education, in healthcare, in housing, at work, and at the hands (and boots) of police. I know what it’s like to struggle to make ends meet, and I carry that urgency with me in Congress as I refuse to accept the status quo. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | With love, Cori Bush ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Five abortion gaps we need to fill
body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26704%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s9YFLR0%2btfdKtupzwT5yyQ&sysid=1)
---
#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won’t stop.

That’s why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn’t Know About Abortion.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26715%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5rALf1bYIgLF%2fB0C8t2jOA&sysid=1)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America’s research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26716%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SDvbKhyhmpvZQHPfHuQRvw&sysid=1)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That’s why we’re blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We’re telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I’m thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn’t Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xH6kgr5iE4frObbwh9vJmw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Your America News

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred

name: Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Falling behind isn't an option….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Extreme Ohio Republicans are fighting us every step of the way, team
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64994416/411931245/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZlNmE3ZC0zMjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0V77j3Jn_YAxNCdKDDCRBspeFFe-IDHNBtVZ3G3Dmc=) | Ohio Democrats are facing an uphill battle, team.

Right now, Ohio Democrats are working to defend reproductive rights at the ballot box this year. But, anti-choice legislators are trying to STOP Ohioans from making our voices heard at the polls by making it nearly impossible for Ohioans to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives.

We want to be perfectly clear, team: We can't let a few extreme politicians stop Ohioans from enshrining reproductive rights into the state constitution.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Three reasons:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64994547/411931782/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Y2MDVjYi0zMjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgDzXOfD1jenu3lZSL-V0RjQLvb4k9lQHPVQ0dYn4-Y=)
Peter,

We’re a little more than halfway through June, and less than _two weeks_ from the next all-important FEC quarterly fundraising deadline. Here are three simple reasons why meeting our goal is critical at this juncture in the race:
1. The report we’ll file with the FEC will be public information for all to see, and our opponents will be looking closely to gauge whether we have the grassroots support required to win in IL-17. **We need a show of strength heading into the summer.**

2. This will be the most competitive House race in Illinois, and one of the closest in the country, in 2024. Our fundraising targets are set strategically to give us an edge and put us in a strong position to win. **We need any competitive edge possible in a district this close.**

3. The far right is working overtime to defeat me, and a strong fundraising haul would send a signal that their attacks are falling flat. Plus, it’ll show them we have the resources to push back against their ugly smears. **We need to send the extreme-right a message.**

**For those reasons, we’re aiming to raise $40,000 between now and the end of the month. But we’re relying on supporters like you to fuel our campaign with generous contributions.**

**[If you’ve been waiting for the opportune moment to chip in and keep IL-17 blue – this is it! Please chip in $5, $35, or even $100 today to push us toward this crucial quarterly goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64994549/411931784/-665437442?refcode=em-6.17.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Y2MDVjYi0zMjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FgDzXOfD1jenu3lZSL-V0RjQLvb4k9lQHPVQ0dYn4-Y=)**

Thank you in advance, and have a wonderful weekend.

Eric

name: Team Kroemer
subject: David Schweikert's track record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
We need leaders with a proven track record of delivering results and helping others, which David Schweikert does not have.

| Peter,

Kurt is running for Congress because our district has been failed by leaders like David Schweikert for far too long. We need leaders with a proven track record of delivering results and helping others, which David Schweikert does not have.
* Schweikert is a **corrupt career politician** , having spent over 10 years in Congress with little to show for it.
* He’s **bankrolled by corporate donors** and special interests.
* And he’s **pled guilty** to 11 House ethics violations.

David Schweikert is clearly not fit to represent our district in Congress.

As one of the largest states, California has an impact on everything – _especially national policy!_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
|
---
| | Peter,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995198/411934267/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOThmN2RiMC0zNTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AHwC6XaLjPaV4Ov58DH4DksdqdYvEffeQLvjkq88BE=&emci=57d98ad7-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b98f7db0-350d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Our nation has endured far too much suffering due to gun violence epidemic. Each day, 30 lives are tragically lost, and hundreds more individuals are injured.

Nothing is more important than the safety of our families and our communities, that is why I have taken the initiative to introduce bipartisan legislation aimed at implementing universal background checks and closing dangerous loopholes. In Congress, I am leading the effort to compel House Leadership to put gun violence prevention legislation on the floor to save lives.

If you are interested in actively participating in the advocacy for gun violence prevention, I invite you to join us on Saturday, June 24 for Rock the Ride Napa Valley! It will be an opportunity for you to contribute to the cause and support the work of local and national nonprofit organizations that are tirelessly fighting for common-sense gun measures to protect our country from the devastating impact of gun violence.

**_[We’ve finally started to make progress on reforming gun legislation, but we can’t stop now. Will you join us for Rock the Ride on June 24 and demand action>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995200/411934269/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230617_INV_RTR_0_ID_MikeThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOThmN2RiMC0zNTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AHwC6XaLjPaV4Ov58DH4DksdqdYvEffeQLvjkq88BE=&emci=57d98ad7-5b0c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b98f7db0-350d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**

In Congress, I am leading the effort to compel House Leadership to put gun violence prevention legislation on the floor to save lives. If you are interested in actively participating in the advocacy for gun violence prevention, I invite you to join us on Saturday, June 24 for Rock the Ride Napa Valley! It will be an opportunity for you to contribute to the cause and support the work of local and national nonprofit organizations that are tirelessly fighting for common-sense gun measures to protect our country from the devastating impact of gun violence. | | We hope to see you there! Mike | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: This bill won’t make headlines…here’s why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🍄🍄🍄
#
Derek, let’s talk about mushrooms for a minute. (And if you’re already like “why should I care”...please just hear me out? 🙏)
First things first, ‘shrooms are *amazing* crops — and not just the magic ones. 😉
🍄 They’re a uniquely nutritious protein with disease-preventative + cognitive-protective properties.
🍄 They’re too perishable to be imported, which means jobs for American farmers.
🍄 And yes, there is growing research into using psychedelic mushrooms in therapeutic treatments for veterans + others with PTSD!
Now, unless you work in agriculture, you might not know that Pennsylvania’s is the #1 mushroom-producing state in the country. (Fun fact: Chester County farmers grow 60% of all mushrooms produced in the US of A!!)
But under current U.S. law, PA’s mushroom farmers can’t access federally-backed crop insurance policies. That means when their crops face threats like pests or pollution, mushroom farmers don’t get the same protection that other farmers do.
_That needs to change._ Recently, I joined my fellow PA Senator Bob Casey and a bipartisan group of House colleagues to introduce the **Protecting Mushroom Farmers Act!** This bill is a critical step to providing crop insurance to mushroom farmers + protecting the livelihood of thousands of Pennsylvanian farmers.
**Still, why am I telling****you****all about mushrooms??**
Because honestly, this bill of ours isn’t going to make headlines.
The reality is, most of the important work we do in the Senate doesn’t.
But you need to know I’m not in Congress to get my name into the news, unlike many of my extreme colleagues on the far right. I’m *actually* here to improve the lives of hardworking families — just like the ones in Chester County who have passed down mushroom farms from generation to generation.
From protecting our farmers, to raising the minimum wage, to tackling corporate greed, I’m fighting like hell for workers + their families each and every day.
**[So Derek, if you’re ready to support the work that doesn’t make headlines but does make a real difference in people’s lives: will you make a donation now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230617-1?refcode=em20230617-1-8418&refcode2=8418_434096_qrv-Gh&akid=8418%2E434096%2Eqrv-Gh)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230617-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230617-8418&refcode2=8418_434096_qrv-Gh&akid=8418%2E434096%2Eqrv-Gh)**
Ok, I’ve been shii-talking for a while, so it’s time to cap off this email — but please know how im-spore-tant this team is to me! 🍄
Lots of love,
John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230617-8418-footer&t=1&refcode2=8418_434096_qrv-Gh&akid=8418%2E434096%2Eqrv-Gh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8418%2E434096%2Eqrv-Gh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8418%2E434096%2Eqrv-Gh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Schiff
subject: Our most important deadline yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2561%2E5257348%2E1VbStu ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, our
campaign is facing our most important deadline yet.

In just two weeks, we’ll be closing the books on our June end-of-quarter
deadline. Then, mere days later, we’ll file our latest fundraising report
with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) — which will be released for
everybody to see.

Here’s the thing,
Derek: Our
average contribution size has gone down over the last month.

Previously, our average contribution on email was $19.50. Now it’s $17.65.

While that may not seem like a big deal, for a grassroots-funded campaign
like ours, it has a big impact on our ability to meet our fundraising
goals. And Adam is only able to do his important work — like holding
Donald Trump and his cronies in Congress accountable — because of the
support of this grassroots team.

With our big fundraising deadline coming up on June 30, we need to bring
up that average contribution amount to reach our goal and keep up our
grassroots momentum.

To catch up on our fundraising, we have two options:

* Have more people pitch in to help us close the gap.
* Ask our supporters to chip in a bit more than we usually ask for.

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995653/411936208/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNmY2RmMS0zNzBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzIhDlVpsA_BkSo0ggRYMm5K7F0iz8HOKAkirrMIejs=&emci=3350970e-980c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e43fcdf1-370d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Firefighters know something about ladders. And I just love the story Val Hoyle told me about what her dad – a union firefighter – would say: **"Work hard, and hold the ladder for the next guy."** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995654/411936209/1813826426?refcode=2023-06-17-hoyle&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e43fcdf1-370d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNmY2RmMS0zNzBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzIhDlVpsA_BkSo0ggRYMm5K7F0iz8HOKAkirrMIejs=) Thankfully for all of us, Val has been living those values her whole life. First, alongside her dad, who took her to her first picket line at age 6; then later as a working mom, raising two kids while earning minimum wage as a waitress; to the Oregon State House; to her time as Oregon's Labor Commissioner — and now in Washington, D.C. as a Member of Congress. These experiences instilled the grit and perseverance I see from Val both at home in Oregon and on Capitol Hill. **Val is relentless about working for working families, which is why I love having her working alongside me in Congress.** And it's probably a big part of the reason that Republicans want to take her out in the next election. She needs _our_ help to build and organize her grassroots movement. **[Can you chip in $19 and help build Val's grassroots movement for working families today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995655/411936210/-300266825?refcode=2023-06-17-hoyle&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e43fcdf1-370d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNmY2RmMS0zNzBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzIhDlVpsA_BkSo0ggRYMm5K7F0iz8HOKAkirrMIejs=)** [CHIP IN $19](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995656/411936216/-300266825?refcode=2023-06-17-hoyle&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e43fcdf1-370d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNmY2RmMS0zNzBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzIhDlVpsA_BkSo0ggRYMm5K7F0iz8HOKAkirrMIejs=) With each rung of the ladder Val cleared, she ensured that she was making way and steadying it for the next person. Val was instrumental in raising the minimum wage in Oregon. She defends reproductive rights. She fights to solve the climate crisis. And every day, I see Val working hard for hard working families across Oregon. Right now Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans are working to stop Val and make sure working families have one fewer champion in Congress. **Val won't stand down, Val won't stop fighting, because she knows what's at stake for working families:** Keeping a roof over their heads; Making sure the fridge isn't empty; Getting kids a good education; and Having a good job that pays a living wage. **Val is fighting for all these and so much more.[Will you help us build her grassroots movement and make sure she can keep up the fight for working families? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64995657/411936231/-300266825?refcode=2023-06-17-hoyle&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e43fcdf1-370d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDNmY2RmMS0zNzBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzIhDlVpsA_BkSo0ggRYMm5K7F0iz8HOKAkirrMIejs=)** clean_body: | | | | Firefighters know something about ladders. And I just love the story Val Hoyle told me about what her dad – a union firefighter – would say: "Work hard, and hold the ladder for the next guy." = Thankfully for all of us, Val has been living those values her whole life. First, alongside her dad, who took her to her first picket line at age 6; then later as a working mom, raising two kids while earning minimum wage as a waitress; to the Oregon State House; to her time as Oregon's Labor Commissioner — and now in Washington, D.C. as a Member of Congress. These experiences instilled the grit and perseverance I see from Val both at home in Oregon and on Capitol Hill. Val is relentless about working for working families, which is why I love having her working alongside me in Congress. And it's probably a big part of the reason that Republicans want to take her out in the next election. She needs our help to build and organize her grassroots movement. = = With each rung of the ladder Val cleared, she ensured that she was making way and steadying it for the next person. Val was instrumental in raising the minimum wage in Oregon. She defends reproductive rights. She fights to solve the climate crisis. And every day, I see Val working hard for hard working families across Oregon. Right now Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans are working to stop Val and make sure working families have one fewer champion in Congress. Val won't stand down, Val won't stop fighting, because she knows what's at stake for working families: Keeping a roof over their heads; Making sure the fridge isn't empty; Getting kids a good education; and Having a good job that pays a living wage. Val is fighting for all these and so much more.= Onward!
