Peter, In April, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging **Joe Manchin** for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13b7c092f9dd469db101eb51be20e600&_e=EPZR4IwSWClT2rUOXioGz4c-8M0N6BiUesJmI32cJHj3mI9mVuF7xQWc4FGctwbNk0CRxlXaeHXxp3i-9MQsxzXBo6NQUGcEl44dlON7P305Pv0-1oaKxj-FXRHdab7xjwfhx2yQojIunIDaRSzNIJLfnKcJ852c3mtT7jVY5eDaJpdV1RrSx2rtAhfuTgKRf-BaJxyv4wq2ss9l-vHJ-dFp0n25sRCv9E1I8YYcK9W4awyTi4mFFsYAfPKb5K6V4jaxCAv2LY9bN_i4jBxWBSqB-wPTmd7WqDnGZOzzLBNsZcRk-rewUdPfYn4xjpRlmPmOPjlOmx-epqLdhi_r_Jy7WCcMXt0rkhe59rx53KMndvvTli-6fuPtsxY62qXzWMSI4S8fEGuZ3SI5NXAW-eUfD2rbgRgf9ygcGYm2azVRC5dUo1j4q7xp02LaA-kVMB6MNg2_LGGiYSGCaKXzHb84QmxIsXr9FUSU8eRbgaJLfM402-b_pubY20QMO3P6BbaUJVQ3s9XFEmAJIOVhQQyXxtaSAbs3rlLKHfioo1xPL1XUcoL36ULkQTilCuJzqg8kQBx-gPzJ7gLE9M-1FvdrV_RAvu3FgW4GJ1Gg0dA%3D)**

**We need 56 more responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13b7c092f9dd469db101eb51be20e600&_e=EPZR4IwSWClT2rUOXioGz4c-8M0N6BiUesJmI32cJHj3mI9mVuF7xQWc4FGctwbNk0CRxlXaeHXxp3i-9MQsxzXBo6NQUGcEl44dlON7P305Pv0-1oaKxj-FXRHdab7xjwfhx2yQojIunIDaRSzNIJLfnKcJ852c3mtT7jVY5eDaJpdV1RrSx2rtAhfuTgKRf-BaJxyv4wq2ss9l-vHJ-dFp0n25sRCv9E1I8YYcK9W4awyTi4mFFsYAfPKb5K6V4jaxCAv2LY9bN_i4jBxWBSqB-wPTmd7WqDnGZOzzLBNsZcRk-rewUdPfYn4xjpRlmPmOPjlOmx-epqLdhi_r_Jy7WCcMXt0rkhe59rx53KMndvvTli-6fuPtsxY62qXzWMSI4S8fEGuZ3SI5NXAW-eUfD2rbgRgf9ygcGYm2azVRC5dUo1j4q7xp02LaA-kVMB6MNg2_LGGiYSGCaKXzHRvpy2goG5OM7JFZPIyX9EbsMPZ4FVUDHpm5XYQ8FSCzI3B5MUcwLRetJoxHN3BsiFJxKxXww_zF56L-Qxfce0i8jutDaK4CLzs48EzP6m_P1AynXBiMmGjTXrMWIBBCPlW-tqoQ-fps3h4v-rOJeUI%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=13b7c092f9dd469db101eb51be20e600&_e=EPZR4IwSWClT2rUOXioGz4c-8M0N6BiUesJmI32cJHj3mI9mVuF7xQWc4FGctwbNk0CRxlXaeHXxp3i-9MQsxzXBo6NQUGcEl44dlON7P305Pv0-1oaKxj-FXRHdab7xjwfhx2yQojIunIDaRSzNIJLfnKcJ852c3mtT7jVY5eDaJpdV1RrSx2rtAhfuTgKRf-BaJxyv4wq2ss9l-vHJ-dFp0n25sRCv9E1I8YYcK9W4awyTi4mFFsYAfPKb5K6V4jaxCAv2LY9bN_i4jBxWBSqB-wPTmd7WqDnGZOzzLBNsZcRk-rewUdPfYn4xjpRlmPmOPjlOmx-epqLdhi_r_Jy7WCcMXt0rkhe59rx53KMndvvTli-6fuPtsxY62qXzWMSI4S8fEGuZ3SI5NXAW-eUfD2rbgRgf9ygcGYm2azVRC5dUo1j4q7xp02LaA-kVMB6MNg2_LGGiYSGCaKXzHRcinelK-OFVgaULry5-mEUL7k58gr0OEx7E2FkPp6T3HxxIfCnJlzk-ae7CJCxY2zJ3XtDpVpGmlCwnwZVwUAIRxqFBmDyhglb7QCv7EMu8sQrkTRQIA6pwrxk691m2Fl8UR_Gtlbk5Ty97ZAnOUeI%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: Jim Justice is challenging Joe Manchin because his failure to stand up to Chuck Schumer has put all of us in a precarious position, not to mention bankrupting our country. | | Peter, In April, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies. Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959; Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia. As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election, We need 56 more responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you. Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an $80,000 Maserati SUV around D.C., but he also lives on a $700,000 houseboat in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants. American people are paying the price. Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene. Please, if you can, We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign. Respectfully, Team Justice | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

Peter,

body:
the GOP attacks on democracy are only escalating

Team, the GOP attacks on democracy and voting rights are only escalating.

**FIRST:** After the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie fueled Republican lawmakers in nearly half of all states to pass _dozens_ of new laws making it harder to vote.

**THEN:** The _Washington Post_ reported that **“Black voting rights [are] under threat in GOP supermajority states,”** as Republican lawmakers use racial gerrymandering and voter suppression to undermine the voting power of communities of color ahead of 2024.

**NOW:** It’s up to us to fight back to make sure Americans’ voices are heard – as A.G. Holder has said, **“We’re going to have to go state by state to protect voting rights.”** **That’s exactly what the NDRC has been doing. Will you rush an urgent donation to help us continue our democracy-saving work across the country?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Here’s the good news, team: Our efforts are _working_.**

In states like Michigan and Minnesota, our movement helped Democrats take full control of state government for the first time in _years_. Now, Democrats in those states are working to expand voting rights.

And, just recently, the Supreme Court rejected the arguments brought by Republican lawmakers in _Allen v. Milligan_ seeking to dismantle key protections of the Voting Rights Act.

**Still, our challenge** is that Republicans are more determined than ever to undermine the people’s voices by using tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold on to power. That means we can’t pull back on our efforts.

clean_body: the GOP attacks on democracy are only escalating | Team, the GOP attacks on democracy and voting rights are only escalating. FIRST: After the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie fueled Republican lawmakers in nearly half of all states to pass dozens of new laws making it harder to vote. THEN: The Washington Post reported that “Black voting rights [are] under threat in GOP supermajority states,” as Republican lawmakers use racial gerrymandering and voter suppression to undermine the voting power of communities of color ahead of 2024. NOW: It’s up to us to fight back to make sure Americans’ voices are heard – as A.G. Holder has said, “We’re going to have to go state by state to protect voting rights.” That’s exactly what the NDRC has been doing. Will you rush an urgent donation to help us continue our democracy-saving work across the country? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s the good news, team: Our efforts are working. In states like Michigan and Minnesota, our movement helped Democrats take full control of state government for the first time in years. Now, Democrats in those states are working to expand voting rights. And, just recently, the Supreme Court rejected the arguments brought by Republican lawmakers in Allen v. Milligan seeking to dismantle key protections of the Voting Rights Act. Still, our challenge is that Republicans are more determined than ever to undermine the people’s voices by using tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold on to power. That means we can’t pull back on our efforts. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We have only a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, as one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice. But, we can replace him Tuesday with progressive champion, Laschrecse Aird!
body:
Tuesday primary election!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T147b3df6-acb4-4d75-9150-98994ecec19b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Will we let Republicans keep criminalizing abortion in states around the country?? **_Sure, we've had great victories in Michigan & Minnesota. _Yet, recently, as The Guardian pointed out:
> _Nebraska's state legislature passed a 12-week ban.., days after another 12-week ban cleared its final hurdle in North Carolina._
Recently South Carolina was added to this list with an even more cruel six-week ban. _We must stop them from adding Virginia to that list!_ [**We have only a one vote pro-choice majority in the VA State Senate, as _one "Democratic" Senator, Joe Morrissey, is anti-choice. But, we can replace him on Tuesday _****_with progressive champion, Laschrecse Aird!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65f536ca-3557-4e96-8ab9-12427cb7e01d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Aird has specifically labeled her campaign "Roe not Joe" _(as in Morrissey)**. She has the support of every female VA State Senate Democrat, Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger and many male VA State House & State Senate members. _Again, we have **only THREE DAYS until an election **that may **determine whether millions of VA women retain their right to choose, or a "Democrat" joins Gov. Youngkin and a GOP State House to pass a full ban.**_ [**_Will you please join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," campaign by giving Lashrecse Aird $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so she can replace Morrissey as a critical vote to protect abortion rights in Virginia?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fa3cd38-19fc-4157-8f6c-6c8a13165bb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for all women in Virginia and around the country. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7253d4c6-e632-43c9-95c1-f900432bb622/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Susan Wild
subject: a message for my top supporters:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64996879/411940734/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230617-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc3YjBkYy0zYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeI9HtfSmAldExkHKzZyZTGWG20-Iisf2stKlU3wpls=)
---
| | | **Below is a PA-07 State of the Race Memo for top supporters like you. If you don’t have time to read it right now, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to ensure I have the resources to stay in Congress.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64996880/411940735/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230617-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc3YjBkYy0zYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeI9HtfSmAldExkHKzZyZTGWG20-Iisf2stKlU3wpls=)
---
Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024 – when we will take back the House majority. Here’s the plan:

**First,** we will continue our tradition of outstanding constituent services. I am fortunate enough to have a truly committed and caring team in my district office, and I constantly receive compliments from people about the service they received in navigating federal agencies, getting overdue IRS refunds, applying for all kinds of federal grants, and more.

**Second,** I intend to continue to work in Washington in as bipartisan a manner as I possibly can. It's not easy, but I have forged strong relationships across the aisle with enough Republicans that I am proud to say that I earned a top 12% bipartisan score from the independent Lugar Center, and that 77% of the bills I signed on to last term were bipartisan bills.

**Third,** I intend to work hard on legislation and in my committees. I am not a drama queen or a rabble rouser. In my district, people have a strong work ethic and expect the same from their elected officials. My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district.

There’s one more very important piece of our strategy to win, and that's where you come in: my House race was the most expensive in Pennsylvania last year, and with Republicans already running attack ads against me, it’s shaping up to be even more expensive this time. I don’t take corporate PAC money; I rely on supporters like you to ensure I have the resources to defend myself against partisan attacks. **That’s why I’m asking you to continue your support for my re-election campaign with an investment of $10 or more right away.[_Can I count on you to chip in today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64996881/411940736/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230617-z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc3YjBkYy0zYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeI9HtfSmAldExkHKzZyZTGWG20-Iisf2stKlU3wpls=)**
| [CHIP IN $10 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64996882/411940737/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230617-z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc3YjBkYy0zYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeI9HtfSmAldExkHKzZyZTGWG20-Iisf2stKlU3wpls=)
---
| [CHIP IN MORE! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64996883/411940738/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230617-z-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc3YjBkYy0zYTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeI9HtfSmAldExkHKzZyZTGWG20-Iisf2stKlU3wpls=)
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read these updates and for believing that Pennsylvania families and workers deserve a strong advocate in Congress.

Sincerely,
Susan

* * *

clean_body: As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024. | = | | | Below is a PA-07 State of the Race Memo for top supporters like you. If you don’t have time to read it right now, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to ensure I have the resources to stay in Congress. | = Peter, As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024 – when we will take back the House majority. Here’s the plan: First, we will continue our tradition of outstanding constituent services. I am fortunate enough to have a truly committed and caring team in my district office, and I constantly receive compliments from people about the service they received in navigating federal agencies, getting overdue IRS refunds, applying for all kinds of federal grants, and more. Second, I intend to continue to work in Washington in as bipartisan a manner as I possibly can. It's not easy, but I have forged strong relationships across the aisle with enough Republicans that I am proud to say that I earned a top 12% bipartisan score from the independent Lugar Center, and that 77% of the bills I signed on to last term were bipartisan bills. Third, I intend to work hard on legislation and in my committees. I am not a drama queen or a rabble rouser. In my district, people have a strong work ethic and expect the same from their elected officials. My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district. There’s one more very important piece of our strategy to win, and that's where you come in: my House race was the most expensive in Pennsylvania last year, and with Republicans already running attack ads against me, it’s shaping up to be even more expensive this time. I don’t take corporate PAC money; I rely on supporters like you to ensure I have the resources to defend myself against partisan attacks. That’s why I’m asking you to continue your support for my re-election campaign with an investment of $10 or more right away.= | = | = Thank you so much for taking the time to read these updates and for believing that Pennsylvania families and workers deserve a strong advocate in Congress. Sincerely, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. clean_body: | | | | Andy is the father of two adorable little boys. He always says he's in this fight for his kids and for future generations everywhere. Yesterday Andy was on Good Morning America! During the show, he opened up about how being a dad has influenced his work in Congress. You won't want to miss it! As a dad, Andy has first-hand experience with many of the challenges that families face, including child care. That's why he's a founding member of the Congressional Dad's Caucus. Together, they're advocating for policies to improve the lives of hardworking families all across the country. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | WE’RE COMING UP ON THE DEADLINE AT THE END OF THIS MONTH THAT WILL DECIDE EVERYTHING. Peter — We’re rapidly approaching the end of the month, and we’re still running behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We know it’s not going to be easy to take back the House majority, expand our majority in the Senate, and block Donald Trump’s path back to the White House all in one cycle , but we also know that the future of our democracy hinges on our ability to do so — and that starts with knocking this $80,000 goal out of the park. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Important update on the DMV and self-driving vehicles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998310/411946216/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3MDRiM2MtNDIwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I3YOZqSbj_bejhXs8_Uc86bCeoKNbXGL24jYtvC3RGg=) Friend,

As the chair of the Transportation Committee, I’ve been dealing with the development of self-driving vehicles -- an exciting but as yet still evolving new technology.

California often leads the way in cutting-edge innovation, which is one of the things I love most about our state. But innovation requires regulation to prevent accidents and unintended harm.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998311/411946217/-1880327709?refcode=em-6.17.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3MDRiM2MtNDIwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I3YOZqSbj_bejhXs8_Uc86bCeoKNbXGL24jYtvC3RGg=&emci=138976c6-410d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e704b3c-420d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)
California allows for the deployment of single-passenger self-driving cars – which are currently being used in our cities. This is an appropriate way to test out the new technology.

But the industry now wants to test autonomous tractor-trailers on our highways _without_ a driver behind the wheel. These vehicles are massive and have the potential to cause death and destruction if anything goes wrong.

**This is a risk we cannot take; which is why I am a joint author of AB 316 -- legislation that allows industry to test self-driving trucks, but with a _driver behind the wheel_ until we know that they’re safe to put on our roads.**

I was proud to see this legislation pass in the Assembly, and it’s my hope that the Senate does the same.

**[Right now, I’m asking you to add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of my legislation to keep unmanned vehicles off our freeways until we have more data about the safety of their use. Please sign on to let me know you’re with me on this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998312/411946218/-1880327709?refcode=em-6.17.23-clickers-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U3MDRiM2MtNDIwZC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I3YOZqSbj_bejhXs8_Uc86bCeoKNbXGL24jYtvC3RGg=&emci=138976c6-410d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e704b3c-420d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

Thank you,

Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, As the chair of the Transportation Committee, I’ve been dealing with the development of self-driving vehicles -- an exciting but as yet still evolving new technology. California often leads the way in cutting-edge innovation, which is one of the things I love most about our state. But innovation requires regulation to prevent accidents and unintended harm. California allows for the deployment of single-passenger self-driving cars – which are currently being used in our cities. This is an appropriate way to test out the new technology. But the industry now wants to test autonomous tractor-trailers on our highways without a driver behind the wheel. These vehicles are massive and have the potential to cause death and destruction if anything goes wrong. This is a risk we cannot take; which is why I am a joint author of AB 316 -- legislation that allows industry to test self-driving trucks, but with a driver behind the wheel until we know that they’re safe to put on our roads. I was proud to see this legislation pass in the Assembly, and it’s my hope that the Senate does the same. Thank you, Laura | **** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

Friend,

**The average grassroots contribution to my campaign is $29.**
That $29 might not sound like enough to make a direct impact in a Senate race. Extremist Republican candidates are bankrolled by far-right megadonors. It takes thousands of dollars for us to run just one TV ad. And on top of all that, we're up against historic headwinds after New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades.
But when hundreds or thousands of people chip in $29, once, twice, or maybe even monthly, those gifts of $29 start to add up. Before you know it, that $29 has become a war chest capable of taking on the GOP's biggest megadonors. That's how grassroots campaigns are built, friend: Dollar by dollar. Gift by gift. Donor by donor.
I'm 100% committed to running a full grassroots campaign. I refuse to take a single penny from corporate PACs. Because I know that our democracy only works when our leaders answer to people, not corporations. _But grassroots campaigns only work when people like you invest in them._

name: Swalwell HQ
subject: Waiting for the next act to start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Don’t think for a second that the Chaos Caucus is done. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998364/411946469/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTZlNzE2Ny00MjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0UYrOKzjUe2yRPX1MML1nBibV7PvmOlCWKKGo_0rgE=)
Friend, Just because the Chaos Caucus took a break this week doesn’t mean that the show is over. When Speaker-in-Name-Only McCarthy promised to give the most extreme members of the GOP anything they desired so he could clutch the Speaker’s gavel, they wouldn’t let him slip back on his promises. Make no mistake, team, they are STILL displeased by the Fiscal Responsibility Act. That means more House floor mayhem is on the horizon in the coming weeks. **The ultra-right is creating an all-out circus in Congress, and we’re stuck sitting around for their next act to start. It’s embarrassing, it’s _dangerous_ , and it has to stop. ** **2024 is our chance to clear out the circus and flip their seats to leaders who care more about addressing the issues hurting working families than they do about securing a spot on primetime.** [**Will you pitch in $25, or whatever you can, so we can get these limelight leeches out of office for good?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998365/411946497/-334321474?&refcode=E3041-20230617-NextAct-SL-GOP&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTZlNzE2Ny00MjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0UYrOKzjUe2yRPX1MML1nBibV7PvmOlCWKKGo_0rgE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Don’t think for a second that the Chaos Caucus is done. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friend, Just because the Chaos Caucus took a break this week doesn’t mean that the show is over. When Speaker-in-Name-Only McCarthy promised to give the most extreme members of the GOP anything they desired so he could clutch the Speaker’s gavel, they wouldn’t let him slip back on his promises. Make no mistake, team, they are STILL displeased by the Fiscal Responsibility Act. That means more House floor mayhem is on the horizon in the coming weeks. The ultra-right is creating an all-out circus in Congress, and we’re stuck sitting around for their next act to start. It’s embarrassing, it’s dangerous , and it has to stop. 2024 is our chance to clear out the circus and flip their seats to leaders who care more about addressing the issues hurting working families than they do about securing a spot on primetime. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = — Swalwell HQ | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! This is the _exact_ moment our opponents and the naysayers have been waiting for. They’ve been looking for a weakness in our campaign—and they’re pinning all of their hopes on us submitting an underwhelming FEC fundraising report to turn the tides in Maryland’s upcoming Senate race.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** With Angela’s primary opponent being a self-funded, multi-millionaire, we can’t afford to wait until the very last minute to pull off a strong fundraising quarter.
Instead, we need small-dollar, grassroots supporters like you to step up and pitch in whatever you can right away. **It’s the only way to compete with the millions of dollars that are going to be spent in Maryland’s Senate race in the run-up to Election Day.**

subject: Imagine if Sarah Palin had won…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILD ALASKA'S FUTURE ACTION FUND
body:
After the debt ceiling deal was passed and signed into law, far-right Republican members decided to throw a temper tantrum and stop the House of Representatives from functioning.

| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64998761/411949162/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230617_debtceiling&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmUyMTE0My00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kZRpO0RIfS97AXvCtNKPvLsk3Gmfb7s6nKmoHSKYVs=&emci=8c92ce78-460d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9fe21143-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

| | | Friend, With the economy hanging in the balance, the federal government narrowly averted disaster by striking a deal on raising the debt ceiling. But we should never have come so close to the deadline. **Our country is fortunate to have level-headed people like Rep. Mary Peltola making common-sense decisions.** With extremist members of the GOP attacking the deal that was reached, we’re sure glad there were adults in the room to pull us through the gridlock and avoid the looming economic catastrophe. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64998762/411949163/1859846009?refcode=E3058-20230617-DebtCeiling-Image-Economy&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230617_debtceiling&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmUyMTE0My00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kZRpO0RIfS97AXvCtNKPvLsk3Gmfb7s6nKmoHSKYVs=&emci=8c92ce78-460d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9fe21143-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund will continue to support Mary Peltola and other candidates who put people first and reject extremism. After the debt ceiling deal was passed and signed into law, far-right Republican members decided to throw a temper tantrum and stop the House of Representatives from functioning.
_That’s just childish._
Now, folks — imagine a scenario in which Sarah Palin had won the last election and had become Alaska’s voice in the U.S. House. **Palin would be LEADING the effort to bring the people’s House to a halt.**
_**We’re committed to making sure that never happens.**_ Our work in Alaska to elect fair, just, and committed leaders will benefit the entire country. And as Alaska becomes an undeniably purple state, we will send a message to the GOP that their brand of extremism will not be tolerated.
[**So please, friend, will you pitch in with a contribution to help us continue to support Mary Peltola and defend against challenges from extreme right-wing hardliners?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64998765/411949166/1859846009?refcode=E3058-20230617-DebtCeiling-SL-Economy&amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230617_debtceiling&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmUyMTE0My00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kZRpO0RIfS97AXvCtNKPvLsk3Gmfb7s6nKmoHSKYVs=&emci=8c92ce78-460d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9fe21143-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

Hey Peter, happy Saturday!

I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight.

I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.

I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.

I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.

**But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.**

subject: Dad taught me about abortion rights

body:
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998995/411950811/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmE4MGE4Ni00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgNjNtL8UVQzCQN3r-Ek2LI_nTYDU-jITWDzBiSHvD4=&emci=47080f72-200d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1fa80a86-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998996/411950812/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmE4MGE4Ni00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgNjNtL8UVQzCQN3r-Ek2LI_nTYDU-jITWDzBiSHvD4=&emci=47080f72-200d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1fa80a86-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before _Roe v. Wade_ ...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998997/411950821/1610638071?refcode=em20230617pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=1fa80a86-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmE4MGE4Ni00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgNjNtL8UVQzCQN3r-Ek2LI_nTYDU-jITWDzBiSHvD4=)
Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats.
Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue.
My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy.
**My opponent, Lauren Boebert, wants you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not.**
What’s extreme is Boebert pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages.
Boebert’s views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor.
I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme.
**Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you consider chipping in to my campaign today to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the country, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64998998/411950835/1610638071?refcode=em20230617pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=1fa80a86-490d-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmE4MGE4Ni00OTBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgNjNtL8UVQzCQN3r-Ek2LI_nTYDU-jITWDzBiSHvD4=)

That’s me, friend: Colin Allred. I've always been a big reader. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them.
Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

clean_body: we have a real chance to win this thing | = | = That’s me, friend: Colin Allred. I've always been a big reader. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz.= = Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you can. name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Do you recall the 2016 Bernie campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This email will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today,
but it’s really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

Since January 2021, our fundraising has been in a slow but steady decline
and it really isn’t sustainable for us as an organization. Here’s a
screenshot from our actual ActBlue dashboard:

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on supporters like
you to power our work.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to challenge the entire
political establishment and elect more progressive change-makers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135019?refcode=em20230617-29475&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC ]→ Will you now dig deep and make your first contribution of
$3 right now to support our critical work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135019?refcode=em20230617-29475&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC ]Contribute $3

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you, thank you again.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230617-29475-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29475_1203867_3fbSuC&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29475%2E1203867%2E3fbSuC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Earning votes in every one of these counties is how we’ll win.

| Hi Peter,

Since I announced I’m running for re-election, you know what that means — **_the map is back!_**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64999755/411955017/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230617-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZTIyY2MxLTUwMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zGLnHvUZXj0sKMx0B6vvVdQzVHCDhsceW6IqmoBS_0=)
When Republicans look at this map, they see an opportunity to take back the Senate here in Pennsylvania. **The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024.**

_[**We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Peter, can you join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Fight for Progress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64999756/411955018/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230617-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZTIyY2MxLTUwMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zGLnHvUZXj0sKMx0B6vvVdQzVHCDhsceW6IqmoBS_0=)_

Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs.

That’s what we can achieve if we earn the votes of Pennsylvanians in every county, from Erie to Bucks.

[_**Let’s show the GOP that Pennsylvania is ready for the major fight ahead. Can you split a donation of any amount between Fight for Progress and our campaign to protect our Senate majority?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64999757/411955019/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230617-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZTIyY2MxLTUwMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zGLnHvUZXj0sKMx0B6vvVdQzVHCDhsceW6IqmoBS_0=)
| | | [DONATE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64999758/411955020/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230617-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZTIyY2MxLTUwMGQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zGLnHvUZXj0sKMx0B6vvVdQzVHCDhsceW6IqmoBS_0=)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Stop cruel hunters from wiping out climate-solving beavers
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830021?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | There is no time to waste, Friend. You’re a busy beaver working hard to build your next dam. Efficiency is in your nature, and you will likely have your dam complete within about 24 hours. When the dam is finally complete, it will be a home for you and your family, as well as shelter for other wildlife in your wetland habitat. Not only that, your masterpiece will play an important role in helping mitigate climate change by _**assisting with carbon drawdown, acting as a natural firebreak, and providing water filtration and storage.**_ As you’re meticulously gathering mud, logs, and rocks for your dam’s construction and making your way back to the river, your small webbed feet suddenly **feel a painful sensation that’s rushing up your body**. Your precious supplies drop from your front paws. Through your bucked-teeth, you cry out in agony...but to no avail. _**You have been caught in a trap set out by cruel hunters!**_ Soon, if you are lucky, you will be **SHOT** out of your misery before being **SKINNED**. Friend, every year, **TENS OF THOUSANDS** of innocent beavers are being _**violently killed**_ like this by hunters -- _all for their meat and fur_. If we don’t act soon to SAVE these helpless beavers, we will not only lose a beloved animal but an important keystone species that scientists believe could be the **KEY** to solving the climate crisis. [**Won’t you take action right now to STOP vicious hunters from ruthlessly murdering beavers? Add your name to protect these climate-saving superheroes before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830022?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830023?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Beavers are known as _**“ecosystem engineers”**_ for good reason, Friend. Wetlands maintained by these helpful critters help our planet combat some of the worst impacts of human-driven climate change like _greenhouse gasses, droughts, floods, wildlife, and habitat destruction_.
**Thousands of species** , including many that are **endangered** , rely on beavers to keep our wetland habitats healthy. Beaver dams and ponds even help provide _**people and animals with clean water**_.
Wildlife, people, and the planet all benefit from these climate-solving superheroes -- but the federal government has _**FAILED**_ to protect beavers from merciless hunters who are threatening to _**WIPE THEM OUT FOREVER**_.
Friend, you can be a voice for defenseless beavers today and help protect one of nature’s most important climate-saving species -- but every minute of hesitation means another innocent beaver is at risk of being _**violently murdered**_ , so your URGENT action is required. **We still need 3,106 more grassroots signatures by 11:59 P.M. tonight, and we’re counting on you to step up right now:** **[Sign the petition to DEMAND a BAN on cruel beaver hunting and trapping on federal public lands immediately!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830024?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1830023?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting beavers and our planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: quick story about voting rights and McDonald's
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, you might think I'm nuts when I say I'm going to tell you a story about voting rights and McDonald's – but stick with me here.
I believe that voting is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans and that democracy only works when we're all able to make our voices heard. So back in the day as Ohio's Secretary of State, I set out to register _as many eligible voters as possible_.

**A huge part of running any successful campaign is meeting people where they are – so that's exactly what I did: I reached out to McDonald's and got them to print voter registration forms on their tray liners, like the one here.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65000221/411956884/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk199-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDdlMDM5Yy01MjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuIEocr8wpW0ohRcxCT2WBkIJG4QyBLmXbdD2x0L0Pw=)
Some of them came back with ketchup and mustard stains, but we were honored to accept them. _The Washington Post _even called our voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation."

I've fought my whole life to protect and expand voting rights – and with the GOP currently waging war on everything from voter ID laws to mail-in and early voting, I promise I'm not stopping anytime soon.
**But I need your help to keep up the fight, friend. I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and this race could decide Senate control.**
**So please, I'm personally asking: [Will you chip in $5 or more now to win in Ohio and defend the Senate so we can continue fighting for voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65000222/411956885/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk199-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDdlMDM5Yy01MjBkLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vuIEocr8wpW0ohRcxCT2WBkIJG4QyBLmXbdD2x0L0Pw=)**
Thanks for giving whatever you can.

– Sherrod
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=f7dEdHM6LbT8ViG9K3UevDsPB2xezwID8Qbp00oLTAlHPtq6CP5ck%2FWpUsGDzHBckasoj6HQnOg2t0xQx7iWCSb3EM0bd%2BUC6uTerRiNhT7gsG8hqFjW7LTot6OZyMo%2BOJ2VafW3X2Tx8ePiKvJJA8zxw9BbwV%2Fz0ZAbml1k6luW5fADyVNqbZVK3b0%2FqLkSolfleE8s6XhEbUUrckcTD7VCZnK7oRdYJCghUviJeXKHy%2FsNNmtb0%2B%2BR9Kq6x9Hx0V%2FSzKH26K90e8%2Bf42gViQGpK2p6RrimtRLKUR%2BdOXNi2nsHA9aS6rRLhNdZg8992FmGman%2FUrLtGj37LlC%2BCBmMtjYj1bCEO3GqoNafGcj1mjaArqQ%2FgeoPVJDPbfUo4PDoQVDouBV4JkmRId2YY40gjCAo79Ew5Fyhg080WDP3X0Pp93Jyl9vm14KtLMhZ) Friends of Sherrod Brown

clean_body: | | | Friend, you might think I'm nuts when I say I'm going to tell you a story about voting rights and McDonald's – but stick with me here. I believe that voting is one of our most fundamental rights as Americans and that democracy only works when we're all able to make our voices heard. So back in the day as Ohio's Secretary of State, I set out to register as many eligible voters as possible. A huge part of running any successful campaign is meeting people where they are – so that's exactly what I did: I reached out to McDonald's and got them to print voter registration forms on their tray liners, like the one here. = Some of them came back with ketchup and mustard stains, but we were honored to accept them. The Washington Post even called our voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation." I've fought my whole life to protect and expand voting rights – and with the GOP currently waging war on everything from voter ID laws to mail-in and early voting, I promise I'm not stopping anytime soon. But I need your help to keep up the fight, friend. I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and this race could decide Senate control. So please, I'm personally asking: = Thanks for giving whatever you can. – Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: When Trump was arrested this last week, Ted Cruz, perhaps Trump’s biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, our justice system & lying about President Biden. Cruz is an embarrassment to the Senate and the country.
body:
Cruz hearts Trump
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42702d53-7860-4612-b39e-58de91a16700/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **After Donald Trump was arrested this week, Ted Cruz, perhaps his biggest suck-up in the Senate and embarrassment to us all, was still defending him by attacking our democracy, justice system & lying about President Biden.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce6930ee-be2f-4174-878c-19873fc54c8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cruz is pure slime. _Luckily, we have a terrific opportunity to replace Cruz with former NFL star, Obama Administration appointee & Texas Congressman, Colin Allred, who knocked out an incumbent GOP Representative to win a key swing seat in 2018._ **_I can't imagine a better resume to take on traitor, coward and all around awful "human being," Cruz. It's why the political prognosticators changed their rankings when Allred got in the race to call it competitive._** [**_As Cruz defends Trump, Allred defends democracy. Let's defend Allred by giving him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get a real Senator from TX._ **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4288e21a-f820-4513-9da5-fb8dad2c2c7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for the Senate. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27a874ee-5a22-447e-b1e8-6fb4cc885700/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: From single mom to Congresswoman

Beth Van Duyne for Congress
body:
I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district. And after a 24-year drought, I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_t=A7eNz_H53wHhvWeEeBWVcL2VrTsgOnVkCGhP68sDOJQw3agCTGjqu1lBPxbMjBbp9L2aHT4UzmNxZCRKueRmXrZ5YgzKSIlUXStvPnRSrgg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_t=A7eNz_H53wHhvWeEeBWVcL2VrTsgOnVkCGhP68sDOJQw3agCTGjqu1lBPxbMjBbp9L2aHT4UzmNxZCRKueRmXrZ5YgzKSIlUXStvPnRSrgg%3D)

---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvrDS5HCb_9-NOajbVQsCKKozhbm0WlenpLGKpcsBB3w_WGrVFWRn2_2ASvzW2SgWFVQy42ZvFSrVSlXnPJfFWqyljd7huh6SNH62JncinvGQd3MJPcVPaPPQhHRR6TovTe_xEqpj3jkuFz3zjyzAkiveXCrOud07JdcXGSDV4hLI)

Fellow American,

Unlike most professional politicians, I didn’t have a privileged leg up or a family member who could make some introductions to get to where I am today.

So let me introduce myself - **[my name is Beth Van Duyne:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvhVObf_2Mhlm7SBwt04mbRfajUeAn07yk0rTtuRLSKiCEgd8wIYc3I7drgu_w4dTqwQubCAv17zuAus1Sex7M_YO_UTaiXiiWx77YlZ8sAyiYtMqqUokM8jERhS1JpLnmlGq6Z5WNpJwTdBCRQVzj4EcF6LpKisNlyDSiCKv4rTJ)**

I am a working, single mother of two amazing kids, a proud American patriot, an unapologetic conservative, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, and a **U.S. Congresswoman with unwavering Texas grit.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvkhZnH_6rUIiKyQLjuxCkBRffhIfylFxzYgjE3sIj1bke7HTkMRQfcMVUPlEA-8sisO7yVO_AT3T8kJbe_nCZ0Ge1ivTlzn0K_hvkKEwBm41rzvstX4YjUrfYuuGbwf2qQ_eh4rUB-XeB8pUlNwzf9yXgqa6RzFKGpcovw7o4RDt)
In 2020, political pundits and polls declared Texas’ 24th Congressional District one of the MOST LIKELY seats in the ENTIRE NATION to FLIP BLUE.

I’m the candidate who beat the odds, defeating the Democrats and proving the pundits wrong. [**With your help, we held onto this GOP battleground district.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvr_3-f25z4wJXZIZNYSpxIuYXqqmxf0-jCukQzVe3IiWyHu_3NW2WylBLcSD429-1GvfHFqSaIzgmJH_e9Kdv3JZVM6NyE1w5yJ0LdWv1sJCqBtp0_5vNCKJSiZtesSu3eDfaHTDAqWqvsiCCEbQbtiqtX6zBXCcqguWyKdiuoIG) And after a 24-year drought, **I became the second Republican woman from Texas to be elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in our history. Together, we kept Texas RED.**

_**I am no stranger to beating the odds, Fellow American. **_

**I left home at the age of 17 with nothing but an unwavering determination and a fierce belief in the American Dream.** For years, I worked numerous jobs just to pay my rent. Eventually, **I put myself through college, defying the odds and graduating Magna Cum Laude from Cornell University.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvt9ML7EOTKQ9RkPAkVe0v46LRbJJ0eQSriBJClO_kE0upgerY89dsOTuAeigqp4AlrgXVKBNAw3egAo2SDzlLDPEXWBYH1yIX6IKD5H-O2iMGNYMuGzNSLFaxZrtNjyaT3Vq4nmywqW8IgQ5UHsbSVlUs78IlV-YwUjboO9yjSc9)
It was a struggle, Fellow American. I was getting paid a little over $3 an hour and working paycheck to paycheck - living paycheck to paycheck. I paid for my own way through college with the help of student loans, and then I struggled for 10 years afterward to pay the loans back.

_**But through it all, I knew nothing would stop me from achieving the America Dream.**_

At my core, I knew my heart belonged in Texas. After graduating, I moved back to Irving, which has been my home for over 30 years. I was intent on becoming an integral part of the place that shaped me. _And that I did..._ **In 2011, I became the FIRST female EVER elected to serve as the Mayor of Irving, Texas.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvpjbsLVZR0gMTAwsZc7VyC6TEvE_E-Ac-1SfVjmUwLucalMDjM2_iY3cryb7snR0pMdk5rJermPBeEnea6mVO0N8Ol7njmigMczGz3vw6VwgLksjjbczsqhYXJgzTir7yARJe0JR8Ty8-1Y_tRQkHHrG5CQ8GMLYhM-T8hXi6Z4G)

**In 2017, I was appointed to serve our nation in a presidential administration, working under Secretary Ben Carson.** I am proud to have worked on many of the Trump Administration’s greatest economic successes, such as opportunity zones and leading Housing and Urban Development’s disaster recovery efforts for southeast Texas in the aftermath of Hurricane Harvey.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvmcnNS8H1NSPCVlJpjH3H_aehtxUYGDXwIGu1jI-U1r7TSZG6eanePsyM1UA-5Pnnx7H6nngR-5fR75IszQAbHmJI74lUNik3RDU5FVStiloG4Rhp_SHutJiua5x3F39Tb22MReHKZ9wOvQfSsBw5vGWePd2V8FCkZJeLRR2bdax)

[ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=076c301037e443b5b94e23d286508bdb&_e=Z6CN3jxLLMZ0BvU-ihtmlS-ZrmqgNKw2755O2oja-unVJVaMGHkbbDulwFFZakRUUZSme8Gyob6H4byD0PoN5lCG3udvGJuu6MOQC-hAQWmV7D6HVUFomlN6VwWhfMD6lq2sTHmAgpvLGzmsCACpPHfflY-vw25gxUQeVN37_Bkn43frf4Raw7pXP2E9DtJIkelWAcIO1MktioREtmM_yHQ2kNUTJYPeLYVCEzqaXIqRfZRNK12wOXHA-HSW1JFUaYSergVHHJPSAmILk55mvkPyh14h1KRHaXgxmSnZoswN6TJI230F3WKBB6iuKh-wm6RQMOr88MLG8FWJUQCl83LAflL7ltUAVi-arYvuJJVa2p7s0mggHtLs_GEXCM4pafibg4Q7uV2Frjj_SWoEHn5tMftsT8XKokgI4GYZLHJ8k5-yWtCjloPQMLErtVty)

** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Merrick Garland has _disgraced himself_ and the entire Department of Justice with this glaringly obvious political indictment of former President Donald Trump. Since 2016, the Deep State has waged continuous war against Donald Trump. During his four years in the White House, the deep state tried to do everything it could to destroy his presidency and to thwart our conservative movement. _Now, those partisans are back in the open. They are brazen. They are running the Biden Justice Department, the FBI, the IRS... and are working with and in the media..._ Merrick Garland is the most partisan and most political attorney general in our nation’s history, and he has corrupted the Department of Justice. He has corrupted the FBI. He has corrupted the machinery of government, and they’re perfectly willing to use it for base political gain. Never mind that Joe Biden faces allegations that he _mishandled classified documents_ and that according to the House Oversight Committee, FBI informants reported Joe Biden was party to millions of dollars in forging bribes. clean_body: This is lawless and disgraceful and must not stand. Learn more inside >>>| | | | ]() Fellow Conservative, I’m sounding the alarm and calling for help. Merrick Garland has disgraced himself and the entire Department of Justice with this glaringly obvious political indictment of former President Donald Trump. Since 2016, the Deep State has waged continuous war against Donald Trump. During his four years in the White House, the deep state tried to do everything it could to destroy his presidency and to thwart our conservative movement. Now, those partisans are back in the open. They are brazen. They are running the Biden Justice Department, the FBI, the IRS... and are working with and in the media... Merrick Garland is the most partisan and most political attorney general in our nation’s history, and he has corrupted the Department of Justice. He has corrupted the FBI. He has corrupted the machinery of government, and they’re perfectly willing to use it for base political gain. Never mind that Joe Biden faces allegations that he mishandled classified documents and that according to the House Oversight Committee, FBI informants reported Joe Biden was party to millions of dollars in forging bribes. With YOUR donation, you'll send Biden an unmistakable message that you'll NEVER BACK DOWN in the fight to stop him from turning our nation into a lawless, banana republic. And I won't let Senate Republicans ignore this attack on us- I’m demanding that we stand together to force accountability in the courts and in Congress to expose Merrick Garland, Joe Biden and the entire Deep State apparatus that is behind this. Thank you for your support at this critical moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: NDRC Elections Update
subject: The good news just keeps coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, we’ve had _a lot_ to celebrate lately. | **FIRST:**
Despite GOP megadonors spending millions in an effort to elect their preferred justice, Wisconsin voters made their voices heard in April by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it **“a critical victory for our democracy.”**

**THEN:**
Last month, our grassroots movement helped Democrat Heather Boyd win an important special election in Pennsylvania, ensuring the state House would remain blue and continue to hold the chamber for the first time in years.

**NOW:
_We need to keep this momentum going!_**

**In the coming months, more than 30 states will hold elections for their highest courts, and state-level elections in places like Kentucky, New Jersey, Tennessee, and Virginia will have major impacts on the future of abortion rights, voting, rights, and more.
